- If you see Mr. Nizam scowling or sighing in frustration, please don't take it personally. That's just how he is. ｜ 如果你看到尼扎姆先生板着个脸或者唉声叹气的，请不用在意，这只是他的常态罢了。
- As it happens, there is one thing that comes to mind. Namely... If the Seven-and-Eight-Gates Method operates according to the principles of the Ley Lines, the same must also be true of the obfuscation process. ｜ 我倒是想到了一些事情。八门七门大阵依靠地脉运行，被隐去之人自然也是如此。
- A dragon as illustrated and thoughtful as myself should surely be granted "enlightened" as a title. ｜ 像我这样有着远见卓识的龙当然应该被称为「善龙」！
- Maybe... Maybe it was Nika? Those kids have been badgering me to take them out to play... ｜ 也许…也许是尼卡翻的呢？那群孩子最近总是过来央求我带他们出去玩…
- It turns out that Fontainians <color=#759BA7>can be dissolved by Water from the Primordial Sea</color>. Over the years, Vacher kidnapped and dissolved many young girls for his experiments to try and find a way to bring back his wife, who had been dissolved. ｜ 原来枫丹人<color=#759BA7>可以溶解在原始胎海之水中的</color>，瓦谢为了找回被溶解的妻子，先后拐走多名少女进行溶解实验。
- I suppose I'll have to train you to be a proper Garde then. If you can handle it, that is. ｜ 那我要给你制定加训方案了。希望你不要喊苦喊累。
- Well, about Xi the Maid... ｜ 关于小茜…
- You can go over there now, Mingli. ｜ 明礼，你现在就可以过去了。
- Increases all party members' Healing Bonus by 20% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色治疗加成提升20%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Is this flavor really a thing? Haniyyah's thought processes sure are interesting... ｜ 怎么还有这种口味？海妮耶的想法还真奇特呢…

- I'm also pitching in. Let's show the Akademiya that we have some fight in us! ｜ 我也会出一份力，要让教令院的人看到我们的斗志。
- Since you're here, shall we grab a bite before you go? Here, wipe your hands with this. ｜ 既然来了，随便吃点再走？给，用这个擦擦手。

- Woah, here's a whole bunch of tiny hats in here. Let's take them to Gulabgir... ｜ 呜哇，怎么这么多小小的帽子，我们带回去给古拉布吉尔看看吧…

- Come on out. ｜ 快出来吧。
- Oh no, I lost! But it was just a game of cards — it doesn't mean I can sell you our special "good wine." ｜ 啊呀，输给你了，客人。但只是一场牌局，还不能卖给你特别的「好酒」哦。
- No, I think they were probably beyond him, too. But despite that, he still stayed next to her, listening to her joys and sharing in her sorrows. ｜ 我想应该不能。但他会在旁边陪着你的母亲，倾听她的快乐，分担她的痛苦。
- You... Ah. Saw my commission, did you? ｜ 你…哦，你是看到了我的委托吧。
- (The rest of the document has been rendered unreadable by weathering.) ｜ （其余的文本已经因为年岁风化残缺，无法解读了。）
- What's the issue? ｜ 是什么事？
- \nMy guess was right. The spores and Fungi are indeed the source of the problem. Having realized that, I then cleared the underground space of spores and defeated the Fungal Beast. It baffles me, however, that the beast managed to resist for so long. Perhaps that was also due to this peculiar environment?\nEither way, the Varuna Contraption has been repaired. Moreover, I learned the music that can modify the weather in this area by controlling the Varuna Contraption.\n\nAranakula said that he would look after the nursery after returning to Vanarana. I suppose we could visit him during down time later? ｜ \n问题果然是孢子和蕈兽导致的。清除了地下的孢子，打败了蕈兽。不过，实在想不通是什么让那个蕈兽能挣扎这么长时间。或许是因为周围的环境？\n总而言之，修好了「法留纳神机」，也学到了能控制「法留纳神机」，并以此控制附近天气的兰那罗曲调。\n\n兰那库拉提到回桓那兰那以后，会去照顾苗圃。有机会的话去看看好了。
- I see... *sigh* Maybe you're right. I'm certainly a stranger to entertainment, after all. ｜ 这样吗？嗯…也有道理，我确实不太关注「娱乐」。
- Crucially, with your help, we can build a solid Graph Adversarial tech pipeline and take Fontaine's technology and law enforcement capabilities to the next level! Everybody wins! ｜ 重要的是，你们能和我一起抓住「图形对抗」的脉络，为枫丹的技术进步和治安做出巨大的贡献，名利双收！
- Understood. ｜ 我明白了。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT], summons 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115072]</color>. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]，召唤<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115072]</color>。
- You can say that... ｜ 是这样没错…
- The beautiful Kingdom of Water Imps is at hand. Warriors, together with Prince Thelxie, reclaim it from the monsters occupying it! ｜ 美丽的水妖王国近在咫尺。勇者们，与「特尔克西」王子一起打败侵占王国的魔物，寻回王子遗失的荣耀吧！
- Sounds awful. ｜ 我有点理解了。
- Such as... who knows, perhaps the dosage was too low. ｜ 比如…剂量不够什么的。
- ...I can't pretend I'm a good person. Bamoun had every reason to despise me, and... Well, so do you, if you feel the same way. ｜ …我不是个好人。巴穆恩恨我理所应当，如果你恨我，也是理所应当。
- Speaking of which, Paimon wonders how Berrypuff is doing... ｜ 说起来，不知道「呜呜葡萄」怎么样了…
- *sigh* Maybe I should just quit and go and find a more suitable job... ｜ 唉，我要不要主动辞职，回去找一个适合我的工作呢…
- Whoa, she brought back nothing but food? What did she get? If you can't finish it all, Paimon'll be happy to help, hehe... ｜ 哇，全是吃的吗？都有些啥呀！要是你一个人吃不完的话我可以帮忙的嘻嘻…

- Continue talking to the locals ｜ 继续找市民交谈

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- A place where time is meaningless and cannot be understood with ordinary logic... So, that was the "turbulence" I was sensing. ｜ 时间本身不具有意义，也无法以常理诠释…原来，这就是我感受到的「湍流」。
- However, those researchers haven't figured out the game rules themselves. Besides, our communication is far from efficient given the long distance between Sumeru and Inazuma. So I've been having a tough time writing... ｜ 因为那群学者自己都没把「七圣召唤」的规则梳理清楚，加上须弥和稻妻离得太远，我们难以沟通，所以写起来非常艰难…
- What can't you let go of? ｜ 放不下什么？
- I thought... Ugh. Never mind, what am I even supposed to say now... ｜ 我刚才还以为…哎哟，叫我说什么呢…

- Oh really? What on earth happened? ｜ 你要戒酒？不会吧，发生什么了？
- Are you... especially fond of loafing around? ｜ 难道你…特别喜欢偷懒？
- Crafted ｜ 合成获得
- Ah, that reminds me, I still have more to discuss with him regarding the lines of the new script... ｜ 啊，提醒我了，关于新剧本的台词，我还得再给他讲讲…
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 6 consecutive spear strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a fixed amount of Stamina, dashing toward a nearby opponent and cleaving once.\nContinuously holding this button will cause Arlecchino to consume Stamina and engage in up to 5s of high-speed movement.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Masque of the Red Death</color>\nWhen Arlecchino has a Bond of Life equal to or greater than 30% of her Max HP, she will enter the "Masque of the Red Death" state, where her Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks will be converted to deal <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color>. This cannot be overridden.\nWhen in the "Masque of the Red Death" state, Arlecchino's Normal Attacks will deal extra DMG to opponents on hit that scales off her ATK multiplied by a certain ratio of her current Bond of Life percentage. This will consume 7.5% of said current Bond of Life. Her Bond of Life can be consumed this way every 0.03s. When her Bond of Life is consumed in this manner, All Is Ash's CD will decrease by 0.8s. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多六段的连续枪击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，向附近的敌人突进，并进行一次挥斩。\n持续长按时，阿蕾奇诺将以消耗体力为代价，进行至多持续5秒的快速移动。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>红死之宴</color>\n阿蕾奇诺具有的生命之契大于或等于生命值上限的30%时，将进入红死之宴状态：普通攻击、重击与下落攻击造成的伤害将转为无法被附魔覆盖的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>。\n红死之宴状态下，阿蕾奇诺的普通攻击命中敌人时，将提升本次攻击造成的伤害，提升值相当于阿蕾奇诺的攻击力乘以当前生命之契百分比的一定比例，并消耗当前7.5%的生命之契，每0.03秒至多因此消耗一次生命之契；通过这种方式消耗生命之契时，会使元素战技「万相化灰」的冷却缩短0.8秒。
- Far from it... I know it looks the part on the outside, but I still don't know if it will really work... ｜ 没，没这回事…我也只是做个样子而已。到底能不能派上用场…我心里，也还没底…
- #Uh, Paimon doesn't really have an answer for you there... {NICKNAME}...? ｜ #这我可答不上来…{NICKNAME}…
- Our village gained its fame from producing dyes, and has been the Shogunate's very own dye production facility for as long as anyone records or remembers. ｜ 我们绀田村因染料得名，千百年前就是幕府的御用染料产地。
- What are you thanking Paimon for...? Anyway, Araja said that we'll need more than one Vasoma Fruit. That means we need to find other Ashvattha's Concourses, right? ｜ 真是的，你在说什么呀…记得之前兰拉迦说了，好像要不止一个恒素果。这样的话，我们还要找别的觉树之堂吧？
- It's an honor you earned together with your father, and now it's back in your hands... What do you say, Yakov? C'mon, man, wake up already... ｜ 这是你和你父亲一起获得的荣誉，现在已经重新回到你的手中了…怎么样，雅科夫，你醒过来了吗…
- Something strange is going on. ｜ 发生了一些异变哪。
- Anyway, before I met Navia, I lived with my Master. She was a powerful and strict woman who had a big impact on many parts of my childhood. ｜ 那时，我和师父朝夕相处。她是一位强大而又严格的人，对我的童年造成了许多影响。

- Other than Xingqiu, who is at the signing event, Venti, Kazuha, and Ayaka should all be around here somewhere. Go see what they're doing at the moment. ｜ 除了在摊位上进行签售的行秋之外，温迪、万叶和绫华今天应该也会在会场附近。去看看他们在做什么吧。
- "Tales of Humanity":\nOh my, the crabs in Fontaine are ginormous!\nAt first I just couldn't understand why Fontainians don't seem to like eating crab when there are clearly so many of them literally on your doorstep.\n...Until one day, when I was chased at least two miles by an <color=#3399CC>Armored Crab</color>, that is! What's got into these crazy crustaceans? ｜ 「人间百态」：\n好家伙，枫丹的螃蟹个头好大！\n起初我不明白，为什么枫丹的水域明明有这么多螃蟹，但枫丹人却不爱拿螃蟹做菜。\n直到我被<color=#3399CC>重甲蟹</color>撵着跑了二里路…可恶，枫丹的螃蟹也太危险了吧！
- Sumeru Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 须弥地区奇馈宝箱奖励

- "Titu" is just a name. Anyone could be called "Titu." Perhaps the one you saw was someone using that name... ｜ 「蒂图」只是一个名字而已，大家都可以叫「蒂图」。说不定你看到的是用了「蒂图」这个名字的人而已。
- Abyss Mage ｜ 深渊法师
- She believes that her legs will never recover, and her dreams of seeing the world would be forever shattered. *sigh* It's... This was all too sudden, too unfair. ｜ 她觉得双腿永远没办法恢复，一直以来的梦都破灭了…唉，这太突然，也太不公平了。

- Wine tasting, I guess. ｜ 那大概就是品酒吧。
- So I boarded a ship bound for Inazuma. I found upon my return that many things have changed. ｜ 于是我就搭船回了稻妻。回来之后，我发觉稻妻变了许多。

- Just a few steps left, now. I've handed the rest over to Eloffe. We should be able to make tonight's show. ｜ 还剩最后几道工序，已经交给爱洛芙了。应该能赶上晚上的时装秀。

- We could try... asking him nicely? Maybe he'd have a change of heart? ｜ 低声下气地去请求的话，商人会心软吗？

- Magnifico finishes packing and hops happily up into his hot-air balloon.\nAs the balloon slowly disappears, his boisterous laughter is reduced to a distant echo... ｜ 马尼菲科收拾好行李，欢快地跃上了热气球。\n随着热气球慢慢远去，小小的马尼菲科哈哈大笑，留下了悠远的回声。

- Please excuse us for now, Traveler. By the way, my intuition tells me that we will have abundant opportunities to work together in the future. ｜ 那么我们就先告辞了，旅行者。顺便一提，我的直觉告诉我，咱们之后还会有很多合作机会的。
- Ancient theatrical scripts, music scores, all the stories of things that have and have not happened... All of them were penned down and stored here. ｜ 古老的剧本、乐谱，曾经发生过的以及没发生过的全部故事…都被记录下来，收藏在这里。
- And perhaps that is how I fight alongside them, by ensuring that their stories will be passed down and remembered, from generation to generation. ｜ …说不定，把他们的故事一代一代地流传下去，能被后人记住，也是一种我和他们一起战斗的方式。

- "It would appear that the hilichurls possess no concept of either the past or future, living only in the present.\nThey do not intentionally store food for survival, nor do they honor the memory of their deceased forebears."\n— Hilichurl Cultural Customs (II)\n\nRandom little things can bring great happiness, inspiring laughter and smiles into which sunlight seeps.\nYet one can never have too much joy, and thus, the happiness of the present should be treasured.\nOur lives are made up of countless fleeting "present" moments that pass us by.\nEven hilichurls, therefore, know the meaning of "living in the present."\nSeize these beautiful moments and string them together into joys still greater. ｜ 「丘丘人似乎没有『过去』与『未来』的概念，而是仅仅生存在『当下』。\n它们不会有意识地为日后的生存专门储存余粮，也不会纪念逝去的先辈。」\n——丘丘人习俗考察·卷二\n\n偶然的小事带来了快乐，笑声中也渗入阳光。\n喜悦永不嫌多，故而应珍惜当下的愉快心情。\n人之一生由无数个飞驰而去的「当下」构成。\n而「活在当下」的道理，就连丘丘人也知道。\n抓住这些美妙的瞬间，串起来便能得到幸福。
- A special motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。
- How do you feel? ｜ 你感觉怎么样？
- You still have a chance. Defeat every Knight of Favonius here, and leave with me! ｜ 你现在还有争取原谅的机会，把这里的西风骑士全都干掉，跟我一起走！
- About the "Mechanical Vertical Lifting Device"... ｜ 关于「械动式垂直拉升装置」…
- It's "Dusk Bird." ｜ 是「暝彩鸟」。
- My fights were devoid of any noble meaning. They were merely the next step in my never-ending journey... the next in a long line of transgressions. ｜ 我的战斗没有光辉的意义，我只是在不停地旅行，然后…不停地犯错。
- Why did you want them, anyway? ｜ 希格雯，你为什么想要这个家伙的审讯记录？
- Elemental Burst: I ｜ 元素爆发·其一
- You got it. ｜ 知道了。
- Iktomisaurs and tribespeople capable of Spiritspeaking can extract the power within Nightspirit Sigils.\nTheir power can be used to empower themselves. Sometimes, extracting it can yield unexpected rewards... ｜ 暝视龙与可使用灵觉能力的部族成员可以提取「灵谜纹」中的力量。\n其中的力量能强化自身，有时，提取「灵谜纹」时也会产生意想不到的收获…
- A study stacked with tomes, its bookcases towering like insurmountable walls. When most people gaze upon the many books laid before their eyes, it might be hard not to feel a little overawed.\nOf course, those in the know are aware that the boundary between wisdom and ignorance is not some boundary that may not be crossed. So long as one is willing to settle in and read these books, one at a time, following a carefully laid out plan, one will gain an incalculable amount of new knowledge before long.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companion: Cyno, Faruzan, Alhaitham ｜ 卷藏颇丰的书房，硕大的书柜宛如不可逾越的高墙。常人的视线扫过琳琅满目的书脊时，心底难免会有敬畏浮现。\n当然，对于有心之人而言，智慧与无知之间绝不存在无法逾越的界线。若是能沉下心来，每日都在这种书房中静坐，遵照条理清晰的计划，一本一本仔细阅览书柜中的卷藏，无需太长的时日，就能触及难以计量的新识见。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：赛诺、珐露珊、艾尔海森
- Huh? Are you sure? ｜ 哎？真的吗？
- Okay, then I'll sign you up. Please come back in three days for the results. ｜ 那我就帮你们报上名了，请三天后再来看结果吧。
- Oh, I'd have to say... working with others to overcome challenges... ｜ 这个问题么，我觉得最有意思的地方，是跟伙伴合作渡过难关…

- That's one down, woohoo! ｜ 首战告捷，很厉害啊！
- The world opens itself before those with noble hearts. ｜ 只要不失去你的崇高，整个世界都会向你敞开。

- It will be some time before the Overlord of the Vortex can make any waves again. ｜ 即使是「漩涡之魔神」，想必也无法再度兴风作浪了吧。
- It is a story from before the rise of The Seven... Although the God of Salt has already perished, it will still be a meaningful experience for your journey. ｜ 那是七神体系建立之前的故事…虽然魔神已逝，不可能是你的寻访目标，但至少，也能为你的旅行见闻增添一些意义。

- There was this time when Coach Iansan noticed I'd overshot my target weight, and decided I needed a cutting phase. Since swimming's supposed to be good for fat-burning, she arranged for me to do an intensive program over at the People of the Springs territory. I'd be there swimming lengths, while Mualani was surfing around and towing Coach Iansan in a life preserver, so she could monitor my progress... Every day, she made me do pretty much the same distance as I do in my 30 thousand-step shuttle runs... *shudder*... Thank goodness Mualani was secretly slipping me some candy to keep my energy up. Otherwise, I don't know how I would have survived... I'm so grateful to her... ｜ 有段时间，伊安珊老师测出我的体重超标了，需要减减肥，而游泳是特别有效的减肥方法。于是我就被安排在「流泉之众」特训。玛拉妮姐姐踩着她的鲨鲨冲浪板，牵一根绳，拽着救生圈里的伊安珊老师，监督我来回游泳，每天要游的距离和三万步的往返跑差不多！唔呃…要不是玛拉妮姐姐悄悄给我塞糖果补充体力，我根本撑不下来，太感谢她了…

- A standard railing extensively used within the "Children of Echoes," designed to safeguard pedestrians and prevent accidental falls from heights. Constructed from durable stone and resilient fabric, it features a unique shock-resistant design and exceptional structural strength, capable of withstanding the full impact of Tepetlisaurs. The choice to test against Tepetlisaurs rather than humans is said to be due to occasional mischievous Tepetlisaurs using the railing as a target for practice... ｜ 在「回声之子」内广泛使用的标准护栏，用以保护行人，防止他们不慎从高处跌落。这种护栏由耐用的石材和坚韧的织物构建而成，拥有独特的抗冲击造型和卓越的结构强度，足以承受嵴锋龙的全力撞击。至于为何要选择以嵴锋龙而非人类作为测试标准，据说是因为偶尔有淘气的嵴锋龙将护栏当成练习撞击的靶标…
- And once you've learned the truth that the Pyro Archon, Mavuika, would never willingly share with you, you may just find it in your heart to consider my proposal. ｜ 当你掌握了火神玛薇卡绝不会透露给你的情报之后，或许你就会重新审视我如今的提案。

- Upon use, emits heat for a short period over a small area, diminishing the effect of Sheer Cold.\nWarming Seelie have evolved in response to the extreme change in temperature to give the comfort of warmth to those who seek it. This convenient gadget was originally crafted by those who struggled to survive in the snowy mountains in imitation of such evolved Seelie. ｜ 使用后，会在短时间内小范围中释放热量，削减积累的严寒。\n「温暖仙灵」是依据气候剧变而进化的形态，能为渴求温暖的人提供慰藉。而这种便利道具，则是曾在雪山挣扎求生的人，依据仙灵的变化创造出的模拟道具。

- A humanoid figurine with an opinionated look that can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nWord has it that this model was inspired by a certain stubborn young resident. As countless stories have said, "Fear itself is not fearful, but rather, not daring to admit your fear." Striving to understand and change oneself may be a good attitude towards life. ｜ 固执己见的人像模型，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据说，这款模型制作时参考了某位顽固的年轻居民。正如无数故事中说的那样——「恐惧不可怕，可怕的是不敢承认自己的恐惧」。努力认识并改变自己，或许是一种不错的生活态度。

- You can reset your performance progress to after the last Villain challenge using the Rewind function. After using Rewind, the status of characters, Wondrous Boons, Mystery Caches, and Brilliant Blessings will all be restored to the state recorded at the Rewind point.\nNote: After using Rewind, the records from Performance Challenges from prior to using Rewind will not be saved. ｜ 使用回溯功能，可以使演出进度回退至上一场「剧演强敌」挑战结束后的回溯点。回溯后，角色状态、神秘收获、奇妙助益与辉彩祝福均将恢复至回溯点记录的状态。\n注意：进行回溯后，回溯前的演出挑战记录将不予保留。

- To be honest, even I was amazed that I managed to receive a Vision. It's really come in handy, but I shouldn't completely rely on its powers. Instead, I prefer to think of it as a sort of safeguard to use in case something happens. As a member of the Knights of Favonius, I should place more importance on team cooperation, and come up with ways to overcome difficulties together with my teammates. ｜ 说实话，能够得到「神之眼」，我也很吃惊。它的确能为我提供不少帮助，但我不能依赖它的力量，而是要把它当成一种保险手段。作为骑士团的一员，我更应该重视团队合作，想办法和同伴们一起战胜困难。

- A dessert made from fermented milk. When mixed together, the dense curd, fragrant petals, and crisp nuts together create a mellow and sweet taste. As that fragrant milky concoction slips down your throat, it is almost as if you can smell the floral scent from a long time ago. ｜ 由发酵乳制成的甜点。绵密的凝乳、清新的花瓣、酥松的坚果，三者交融出芳醇甜蜜的滋味。喉间纵情享受的是此刻滑落的奶香，心头悠悠回荡的是彼时繁盛的花香。

- An excessive amount of Electro in the wilderness has disrupted the elemental balance. Defeat all opponents but beware of lightning strikes while in the area! ｜ 过量的雷元素影响了一片野外区域。注意躲避场间落雷的同时，消灭所有魔物。
- Much like the exorcists who dwell on Mt. Tianheng, the Lan clan, with their affinity for the Qimen arts, have long made Chenyu Vale their home.\nOne such art requires the use of rattan figures. As a result, such figures — and the skills to make them — are something the Lan clan values highly. What sets Lan Yan apart, is that unlike the rest of her family, who view rattan weaving as a means to an end, she views it as an art in itself, one whose importance far outstrips the arcane and esoteric purposes that fascinate her kin.\nThough Lan Yan once studied the classic texts of the Qimen arts under the tutelage of her relatives, she did little more than scratch the surface, and her knowledge pales before experienced practitioners. Then again, she does not claim to be an expert, though that doesn't stop curious members of the association from asking her to perform rituals or ward off ill omens.\nAfter receiving too many such requests, Lan Yan can only sigh.\nBorn into a branch of the Lan clan, Lan Yan does not conform to the typical image of a geomancer that an outsider might have. The only visible sign of her heritage is her silver hair ornament, modeled after the "Jade-Plumed Silverwing."\nThis heirloom symbolizes the Lan clan's connections to the "Eight Adepts" — significant figures in Liyue's history.\nThe term refers to eight great heroes who once fought against the god Tao Dou. Of these eight heroes, the Jade-Plumed Silverwing, Lone Butterfly of the Crimson Flame, and Gold-Eyed Celadon Mare are known as the Three Beasts of Tao Dou.\nOf the remaining five, Wind Reader, the Wuwang Kid, and the Yunlai Angler were honored as the Three Hermits of Guizang. They and the Two Sages of Lianshan were all human.\nThe Jade-Plumed Silverwing had a deep connection with Wind Reader, who was a truly remarkable individual. It was he who first taught the Lan clan the secrets of the Qimen arts.\nThe silver ornament that Lan Yan now wears in her hair has been passed down from generation to generation so that the descendants of the Lan clan never forget where they came from.\nLan Yan knows the story of the Eight Adepts well and regularly makes trips to watch Liyue opera performances that tell of their exploits. Despite this, their story never left a strong impression on her.\nThroughout Liyue's long history, selfless acts for the benefit of future generations — or "planting trees for the children of tomorrow," as the locals like to say — have been a recurring motif. Many such tales have already been lost to the winds of time, while others have entered the collective psyche and become part of Liyue's living folk memory.\nAnd because such stories exist, carefree, exuberant young men and women like Lan Yan are free to roam the wild slopes of Chenyu Vale, smiling and laughing and singing folk songs amidst nature's beauty. ｜ 和以天衡山为道场的方士类似，擅长使用奇门术法的蓝氏一族常居沉玉谷。\n术法中有一门需要利用藤人施术，因此族中向来重视编藤这门技艺。当然，重视术法的宗家藤编师们只把编藤当作手段，而蓝砚则不同，编藤这件事本身就是她的目的，术法反而只是她学着玩的小小游戏。\n虽然幼年曾经跟随宗家亲戚背诵过术法经典，但蓝砚对奇门的了解还只停留在浅层，达不到与资深修行者匹敌的水准。她自己也不以术士自居，只是工会里总有好奇的师傅来问她，能不能帮忙做点法事除晦气、驱小人。\n被问太多次之后，蓝砚也很无奈。\n分家出身的蓝砚并不符合外界想象中掌握阴阳秘术的蓝家人形象，她身上唯一象征蓝氏身份的是发间那件银饰——「银翎翦玉玄鸟」。\n这是她们这一脉珍藏的宝物，象征了蓝氏族人与璃月历史人物「八奇」之间的关联。\n所谓「八奇」，是指曾与魔神桃都作战的八位英雄，其中银翎翦玉玄鸟、朱赤引火幽蝶、金目乘黄月驹三位共称「桃都三怪」。\n万象风角灵官、无妄童子、云来钓叟被誉为「归藏三隐」，另有连山二贤，这五人均是肉体凡胎。\n八奇中的「银翎翦玉玄鸟」与「万象风角灵官」之间颇有渊源，后者亦是妙人，所有蓝氏一门的术法都从他手中传下的。\n这件银饰正是先辈们为提醒所有蓝姓后人他们从何而来留下的。\n蓝砚十分熟悉八奇掌故，以此为蓝本的璃月戏她也时常去听，不过这个故事在她心中的印象并不沉重。\n前人为后人栽树的事在璃月历史上一再发生，很多故事已随时光消散于风中，余下的则融入了后人的生活，变成乡土记忆的一部分。\n正因有这样的故事存在，像蓝砚这样欢欣灵动的年轻人才能在沉玉谷秀丽的山野中歌唱。

When the character is on the field for more than 4s, the aforementioned DMG buff decreases by <color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color> per second until it reaches 0%. ｜ 装备该武器的角色处于队伍后台时，每1秒角色造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>2%</color>，最多通过这种方式获得<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>的伤害提升；在场上超过4秒后，上述伤害提升效果每1秒会流失<color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color>，直到降低至0%。

- He said that he had no way to pay for it, so I loaned him some of my own Mora, and told him to get some stone and timber from the local vendors. Soon after that, I found out that he had gone gambling with all the money, and lost everything, down to the last coin. ｜ 他说自己没钱，我替他垫付了一些，让他去找本地商会买一些石料木材。谁知…他拿我的钱去了赌场，输得干干净净。
- Hehe, just call me "Boss" from now on. That's what everyone in the Spina calls me, and it's what I'm used to. ｜ 嘿嘿，下次见面时叫我「老板」就行！这是刺玫会的规矩，听起来也更顺耳一点。
- What a huge block of ice... Can you see what's stuck inside? ｜ 好大一块冰…里面到底冻着什么呢？
- Waiting for other players to choose ({0}s) ｜ 等待他人选择({0}s)
- #{SPACE}Increases <color=#B09057FF>ATK SPD</color> by {0}%. ｜ <color=#B09057FF>攻击速度</color>提升{0}%。
- ...Where the Abyss is involved, we can't stand idle. ｜ …事涉深渊，很难袖手旁观了。
- Continue exploring the Faded Castle ｜ 继续探索「褪色城堡」
- Yeah. It's what we all agreed to. ｜ 嗯，都说好了。
- I can't be of help if you don't know who you're looking for. Now, if you'll excuse my lack of decorum. ｜ 您都不知道要找谁，那我就更帮不上忙了呀。您明月入怀，还请多担待。
- New life? ｜ 新的生活？
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Plane of Euthymia ｜ 一心净土
- Whew, good thing Azzam was willing to hear me out... ｜ 呼，还好还好…阿扎木先生挺好说话的…
- You little... *sigh* Nothing I say ever gets through to you! ｜ 臭小子…唉，真是跟你说不通！
- I'll be sure to keep a better eye on them next time. ｜ 下一次，我一定会好好带上它们。
- Still need to go through last quarter's financial report... What a headache. ｜ 上个季度的财务报表还没看完…有点头疼呀。
- #Thank you. {NICKNAME}, Paimon and... other red girl. ｜ #谢谢你们。{NICKNAME}，派蒙，还有……另一个红色的女孩。
- "Thanks to the careful consideration of Tenryou Commissioner Kujou Takayuki, the Vision Hunt Decree was implemented swiftly, preventing those who opposed it from fleeing." ｜ 「多亏九条天领奉行孝行大人深谋远虑，『眼狩令』之施行迅疾如电，妄图大逆者皆弃家而逃。」
- A person without a conscience is a person without honor! ｜ 做人做事，可得讲良心啊！
- Verified Type Aur001 ｜ 验证型Aur001
- ...Though aforetime she did as she pleased, the wicked witch could not escape defeat. Even the sea-severing strike could not halt the Traveler's steps! ｜ …那魔女恣意跋扈，逃不过败北之命数。那一刀劈山开海，也拦不住旅人的去路！
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- Traces of Cooking ｜ 制作食物的痕迹
- Spare me, please! The last time I went picking herbs for Anna's medication, a group of Dendro Slimes chased me all the way to Springvale! ｜ 你就饶了我吧，我上次给安娜采药的时候，被一群草史莱姆一直追到了清泉镇里…
- When a Swirl Reaction is triggered, decreases the target's corresponding Elemental RES. ｜ 触发扩散反应时，将使目标的对应元素抗性降低。
- Maybe they haven't finished the Kraken yet. ｜ 说不定海怪的模型还没做完。
- So where's the knife now... ｜ 那匕首怎么没有了…
- Mmm, I'd have to agree with that. Seems like I still have a lot to learn. ｜ 嗯…我也有同样的感觉，看来我要学习的东西还有很多。
- Kurisu ｜ 久利须
- It's raining again... This will hinder our vision, we must remain vigilant! ｜ 下雨了啊…视野会有影响，要小心哦。
- We haven't thanked you or Pyro-1 yet, Haniyyah! Let's at least go get something to eat together... ｜ 海妮耶，我们还没感谢你和「火一」呢！至少一起去吃好吃的…
- #See, see! {NICKNAME} and I think alike. ｜ #你看，你看，{NICKNAME}和我的想法一致。
- It's definitely an ambitious plan... If there's anything you didn't quite catch, Paimon's more than happy to go over it again! ｜ 事情是有些复杂啦…如果甘雨有什么地方没听明白，我可以再仔细讲讲！
- Our Sun ｜ 我们的太阳
- Collei leaves with Sylvain... ｜ 柯莱带着席尔万离开了…
- Hidden Small Print ｜ 隐蔽的小字
- So, I figured that she probably wants you to get to know the life of a crew member. ｜ 我就猜到了，大姐头大概是想让你了解了解我们的船员生活吧。
- O outlander hero, be wary... Tread lightly where our pitch-black enemy roams. Beware the all-corroding foe. ｜ 异邦的勇士啊，请务必小心…小心那漆黑之敌漫行之处，小心侵蚀一切的敌雠。
- #You came to the right place! We're pros at finding people! Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #放心吧！我们可擅长找人了！对吧？{NICKNAME}！
- Oh? Is she a friend of yours? She headed for the Tenryou Commission after submitting her request, you should be able to find her there. ｜ 嗯？难道是两位的熟人吗？那位小姐在发布委托后，先行前往天领奉行了，你们可以到那里跟她会合。
- I was camping with my daughter {0} the other day, looking for a suitable place to pitch a tent. She ended up quietly running off to chase a Crystalfly. Unexpectedly, when I went looking for her, I met a big mushroom, which had two thick legs and looked kind of cute. But I've heard scholars say that mushrooms are dangerous! At that time I was relatively far from it, so it did not notice me, made a few rounds, and left. After finding my daughter, I gave her a serious warning to not be fooled by beautiful appearances conjured up by magic. Hope you also teach your children to stay away from danger! ｜ 前几天我带着女儿{0}野营，想找个适合搭帐篷的地方，女儿不声不响追着一只晶蝶跑远了。没想到，我去找女儿的时候遇到了一只很大的蕈兽，它有两只粗粗的腿，看起来有点可爱，但我听学者们说过，蕈兽都很危险！当时的距离比较远，它没有发现我，转悠了两圈就离开了。和女儿碰头后，我郑重告诫了女儿，千万不要被外表漂亮的魔物迷惑。希望大家也教育自己的孩子远离危险！
- ... ｜ ……
- In my infirmary, I don't see criminals who deserve to suffer — I see patients who deserve a sickbed. Because whoever you are, you have to get healthy so you can serve your sentence and pay for your crimes, right? ｜ 在我的医务室，没有什么「负罪的人在他应在的路上」，只有「生病的人在他应躺的床上」。不管是谁，把身体养好了才能继续坐牢赎罪不是吗？
- Plume of Snow ｜ 雪藏之羽
- I admire your enthusiasm, good sir. ｜ 这位先生很有兴致嘛。
- There are many events of ages past... many secrets that lie hidden... ｜ 这片大陆上还有许多往事，许多秘密…
- Go to Sangonomiya Shrine and look for Kokomi ｜ 前往珊瑚宫，寻找心海
- Ah yes, here's your payment. If chance should allow it, let us meet again! ｜ 这些是给你们的报酬，我们就有缘再见啦！
- Xilonen ｜ 希诺宁
- Well, the Lantern Rite is the most important festival of the year. Our celebrations must not only be visually spectacular, but also appeal to the tastes of Liyue citizens from all walks of life. ｜ 海灯节作为每年的重头戏，不仅要办得精彩，更要尽力让口味各异的璃月民众都能满意。
- Huh? "The feeling of growing"... What do you mean? ｜ 「长高的感觉」？
- An "experimental drink" created by Heinry. It is filled with fizzy bubbles, and you can even taste a bit of a slightly salty tea flavor?\nThis drink feels more like a bottle of "Salty Carbonated Tea," and not Fonta. ｜ 安里制造出来的「实验饮品」。富有很多气泡，还能品出一丝咸味的茶水？\n喝起来感觉这瓶饮料更像是一瓶「咸味气泡茶」，而不是枫达。
- Let's go ask her about what's been going on. ｜ 我们过去问问她情况吧。
- Oh, I understand, that's fine! Still, I'd expect Qiqi to have some sort of dietary preferences, though. There must be some dishes that you like the sensation of? ｜ 没事的，这些我都知道！但就算是这样，七七应该也会有偏好才对。我想知道你喜欢什么感觉的菜。
- The initial contract between us Skeptics and the Pari, and every single Pari's true name! Isn't that enough to pique your interest? ｜ 我等矫论团与花灵之间的最初的契约！还有全部花灵的真名！难道你们不好奇吗？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- The great Aradasha defeated many, many Big Iron Chunks with Ararakalari and locked them up with stone locks. ｜ 了不起的兰帝裟用他的「兰迦拉梨」打倒了许多许多的「大大铁块」，并将他们用石头锁锁了起来。
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 4 ｜ 突破等级「4」阶后开启
- Aw, come on, what kind of rails need to be repaired daily... And thanks to you, we just fixed 'em! From now on we'll only need to do regular maintenance. ｜ 哪有天天需要维修的轨道…毕竟多亏了你的帮忙，轨道这不是才刚刚修好嘛，之后只需要定期检查一下就好了。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Please take care of Nika! ｜ 请照顾一下尼卡！
- Haha. As it just so happens, one of the reasons I'm here today is to explain the details behind this "wild hunt." ｜ 呵呵，其实我今天来这里的一个目的，就是想跟你们解释清这件事的来龙去脉。
- ...Looks like we came at a bad time. ｜ …看来我们来得很不是时候。
- The world is full of all sorts of big opportunities and daunting challenges, as well as small errands... Travelers eager to lend a helping hand to others may come across valuable rewards for their troubles. ｜ 这个世界上充满了各种各样的机遇与挑战，当然也充满了各种各样的小小烦恼…\n乐于帮助他人的旅者，通常也会在旅途中发现珍贵的宝藏。
- This Artifact is locked. Unlock to use it as Extraction material ｜ 此圣遗物已锁定，解锁以作为萃取材料
- About the Locusts... ｜ 关于蚱蜢派…
- It might tell us what happened. ｜ 也许他会在信里说明白。
- Solve the puzzle within the Galezone and defeat all opponents ｜ 解开「风境」内的谜题，并打倒敌人
- We've lost the ability to understand Kichiboushi's speech? ｜ 我们又听不懂吉法师说的话了？
- Yeah! We should try to save whoever we can! ｜ 好的，走吧，我们去看看还有谁可以救！
- Don't get me wrong, Amina is very reliable, and she's learned much in the ways of managing the tribe from her grandfather. I have only the fullest of faith in her potential. ｜ 不要误会，阿米娜很可靠，以前也跟着她爷爷学过很多管理部族的方法，我很信任她的潜力。
- The Raiden Shogun created Musoujin Gorge in one slash? Wow, that's pretty incredible... ｜ 「无想刃狭间」，居然是被雷电将军砍出来的…好厉害…
- I done messed up... ｜ 真是…大意了…
- (Should I release the bird Lyney gave us? No, we should try to get her talking about something else first.) ｜ （要放飞林尼的魔术飞鸟吗？不，在那之前，先试着寻找一些别的话题吧。）
- Overloaded: Evolution ｜ 超载·进阶
- There are some Mushrooms and meat in the barrel over there. Try making a <color=#00E1FFFF>Chicken-Mushroom Skewer</color> for me. ｜ 我放了些蘑菇和肉在那边的桶里，试着做一份<color=#00E1FFFF>「野菇鸡肉串」</color>给我吧。
- Goodbye! All the best to you! ｜ 再见，祝你好运！
- Grandpa... and Dad. Are you here to take me to the other side? ｜ 爷爷，还有…老爹。你们…你们来接我了啊？
- We do miss our Honorary Knight, after all. It's been quite a long time since your last visit. ｜ 荣誉骑士也有段时间没露面了，大家都很想你。
- Wuwang Hill, childhood friends... Seems like we're out of leads... ｜ 无妄坡附近也找了，以前的朋友也找了，这下线索是彻底断了…

- An ancient and mysterious roll of parchment. It seems to contain the final destiny of an adventurer... ｜ 一卷古老而神秘的羊皮纸，似乎记录了某个冒险家的终末。
- Good night. ｜ 晚安。
- How should we make Nilou realize that... ｜ 我们要怎么才能让妮露意识到这里是…
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Huh? What are we doing back here? ｜ 欸？怎么又回来了？
- It should be true. These divinations have always been very accurate. ｜ 应该是真的哦，占卜一向很灵验的。
- Paimon's having a hard time understanding this Balladeer guy's motivations... Why did he do it? ｜ 可是，那个叫散兵的人为什么要做这种事呢？
- More exciting for you, maybe. Rules don't mean a thing in a game as boring as this one. At the end of the day, it's a question of upholding one's honor. ｜ 「精彩」，只是对你而言吧。这种无聊的游戏，规则什么的根本无所谓吧。说到底，只是面子问题。
- So why don't they seem to understand that sound too can have an effect when crafting materials? ｜ 那怎么就不能理解声音也会影响材料合成的结果呢？
- Like... Uh... ｜ 比如…比如…
- You don't get yourself killed either, you idiotic Crimson Oni. ｜ 顺便，你也别把自己搞死了，蠢货赤鬼。
- Those words you wrote among your notes... ｜ 你留在资料上的那几句话…
- #{NICKNAME}, look! There's someone walking out from the shrine! ｜ #{NICKNAME}你看，有个人影从神社里走出来了！
- How's everything been going? Still as happy and well-fed as always? ｜ 最近怎么样？有没有像往常一样开开心心、吃得饱饱的？
- Oh, I see... Sorry, I don't know where he went. ｜ 这样啊…抱歉，我也不知道他去了哪里。
- Ah yes, now that you mention it, I seem to recall that Arataki Itto is allergic to beans. ｜ 哦，你这么一说我想起来了，荒泷一斗他好像对豆子过敏。
- Now, I am grown up. ｜ 我已经，大了。
- You made a discovery during your travels in Fontaine, the Land of Hydro. The collection of items within can be used to upgrade your Talents.\n\nAfter using this item, you may select one of the following rewards:\n·Guide to Equity\n·Guide to Justice\n·Guide to Order ｜ 在水之国土「枫丹」的旅行中有所发现，内部装有可以提升技艺的典藏。\n\n使用后可从以下选项中选择一项作为奖励:\n·「公平」的指引\n·「正义」的指引\n·「秩序」的指引
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- And yet, at the very outset, they're born from the simplest and most beautiful desires we hold in our heart. ｜ 但最初的最初，它们的诞生，都源自人们最简单、最美好的愿望。
- Did you enjoy your visit to the Jade Chamber? ｜ 群玉阁好玩吗？
- (Instruct the Blubberbeast to somersault.) ｜ （指示膨膨兽翻跟斗。）
- Exit ｜ 确认退出
- Inazuma ｜ 稻妻
- I've never encountered such annoying historical relics as these. ｜ 真是麻烦的历史遗留呢…
- So sorry for bothering you every time... ｜ 抱歉，每次都麻烦你…
- Hey! Door Guy! You done thinking? ｜ 喂喂，门那头的先生，你考虑好了吗？
- Ooh, it's you. I must confess that this Kimera of yours is very impressive indeed. A true shame it is that you are not a tanuki, or you would be a most great one indeed. ｜ 呶，是你啊。不得不说，你还挺有本领的，还有那种「楼影鸡」。可惜不是狸子，不然，应该能成为了不起的大妖狸。
- Let's <color=#00E1FFFF>join in</color>! ｜ 我们也来<color=#00E1FFFF>加入兰那罗的演奏</color>吧？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Revenue reaches {param1} ｜ 营业收入达到{param1}
- <color=#FCF6F0FF>The power of the "symphony" here has already been activated.</color> ｜ <color=#FCF6F0FF>此处「乐章」力量已激活。</color>
- Now, could you make me a Gray Valley Sunset, then? I'll leave the size up to you. ｜ 能请你帮我调一杯苍谷落日吗？杯量随意。
- Hello. I'm little Sage's mother. ｜ 哦，你好啊，我是小萨基的妈妈。
- So this trial's a scam... ｜ 原来是诈骗的试炼啊…
- Indwell a Koholasaurus or use Mualani to carry out the challenge ｜ 魂附鳍游龙或以玛拉妮上阵进行挑战

- Use {param2} or more asset types to complete editing ｜ 用{param2}种或以上的素材完成剪辑
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I am a proud citizen of Snezhnaya! I will not falter! ｜ 我也是至冬国光荣的一员，我是不会屈服的！
- Lupus Boreas never refuses trial. But, scary outsider... not respect trial rules. ｜ 王狼，不拒绝，试炼。但，阴森的外来者，不遵守，试炼的规矩。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- A Letter With Clear Handwriting ｜ 字迹疏朗的信
- They're fine for general use, but my customers have high standards, and I don't have the time or resources to find new buyers right now. ｜ 平常使用是完全没问题，但我的客人要求很高，现在再去找新的买家又费时费力。
- "If you want to learn more about saurian whelp habits, you can ask Explorer Ororon." ｜ 「如果希望了解幼龙的习性，可以向欧洛伦勘探员打听。」
- I want to ask the merchant about the craftsman who cut this gem, and where they got their ore. ｜ 我想向那位商人打听一下，制作这块宝石的工匠，是从哪里得到的原石。
- After a character obtains an Elemental Shard created by the Crystallize reaction, they will gain the Redoubtable state. Active characters in this state <color=#F39000FF>deal 15% increased DMG</color>. This state lasts for 8s and can stack up to 3 times, with the duration of each stack counted independently. ｜ 角色获取结晶反应产生的晶片后，将产生「壮固之能」状态。处于该状态下的当前场上角色<color=#F39000FF>造成的伤害提升15%</color>，该状态持续8秒，至多叠加3层，每层独立计时。
- Object initial status ｜ 拟想物件初始状态
- Exactly! Now that Paimon thinks about it... If that had been some kinda poison, we might be taken for murderers! ｜ #确实，现在想起来真有些后怕…要是…要是那药剂其实是什么毒药，{NICKNAME}和我说不定会被当成杀人凶手呢！
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param7:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param7:F1}点
- And music is like a kind of memory written in people's hearts. It can put you in touch with feelings from a totally different time and place. ｜ 音乐是人们心中的记忆，能够超越时空连接起思念…差不多这些。
- Well, I'd like to hire you to get me out of this archon-forsaken place. At this rate, forget my research, even my very life will be cut short! ｜ 我要雇佣你们，快把我带离这个鬼地方，这样下去别说是研究了，迟早要把小命断送…
- Now, concentrate. See yourself grasping the wind. Harness its energy. ｜ 现在想象，你能收束这一缕风。让它破开云翳…
- Grainfruit ｜ 颗粒果
- I haven't heard a thing... *sigh* I'm really out of the loop. ｜ 唔…没听说过，是我太不敏感了吗…
- The hot-blooded, cold-blooded, steel-blooded contest of warriors that I, Yasuhiko Tarou, have organized is presently underway! ｜ 由敝人安彦太郎所主持举办的，铁血的热血的冷血的至强武者大赛，火热进行中！
- "Now's the time!" ｜ 「对，就是这一刻！」
- Nameless Traveler's Notes (IV) ｜ 无名旅人的笔记·其四
- $[K1]: When <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1308]</color> is your active character, equip this card.\nAfter $[A1308] equips this card, she will immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S13081]</color> once.\nWhen $[A1308] uses a $[K51] with this card equipped: Deal +1 DMG to enemies with 6 or less HP If $[K1010] is triggered, then draw 1 card after the skill finishes calculating.\n(You must have $[A1308] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1308]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A1308]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S13081]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A1308]进行$[K51]时：对生命值不多于6的敌人造成的伤害+1；如果触发了$[K1010]，则在技能结算后抓1张牌。\n（牌组中包含$[A1308]，才能加入牌组）

- Save for a few rare and precious tree types, the people of Liyue are accustomed to using broad-reaching collective terms for trees and aren't so fussy about the exact species of tree included. For example, trees with straight trunks are referred to by the more sophisticated-sounding term "Irontrunk."\nThe Green Irontrunk Tree is a ubiquitous sight in mountainous areas. Its timber is regularly used for building houses and merchant boats. ｜ 除了少有的名贵树木，璃月人更习惯以形貌为树木冠以统称，而不在意特定的树种。对于树干笔挺的树木，璃月有着「剑骨」的雅称。\n青叶剑骨树遍布山野，常被用于切削板材，搭建房屋或商船。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 30 and complete "Wishes."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\n1. When the event begins, complete Kazuha's special commission to obtain a singular instrument from him that can be used to play music.\n2. During the event, you can use the instrument given to you by Kazuha to play ensemble pieces together with other characters in specified locations.\n3. Each performance is split into Normal, Hard, and Pro difficulties. Normal difficulty is unlocked by default, and you will unlock subsequent difficulties by completing the previous one with at least a "Euphonia" rating.\n4. Attain certain scores for each tune at each difficulty level to obtain valuable rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30，并完成「愿望」任务。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>1.活动开始后，完成万叶的特殊委托，可以获得其赠予的奇异乐器。\n2.活动期间，使用万叶赠予的乐器，可以在指定位置与角色进行合奏。\n3.每首合奏曲目分为普通，困难，大师三个难度，其中普通难度默认解锁，后续难度会在前一个难度达到余音绕梁评级后解锁。\n4.每首曲目的每个难度达到指定分数后均可领取丰富的奖励。
- Indeed. Now, let me think. To stage a performance, we shall first need to place the "blank score" in here... We should be able to find one here in the castle. ｜ 嗯我想想…要进行演奏，首先得把「空白曲谱」放到这个里面…在城堡里应该能找到吧，我们先找找看。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nApparently, a certain "Unusual Hilichurl" has been active along the merchant route recently, frightening the traveling merchants.\nKatheryne of the Adventurers' Guild is calling on the Traveler to investigate the Unusual Hilichurl. With assistance from Hilichurlian expert Ella Musk, the Traveler is tasked with finding hilichurls that are open to communication and asking them for more information on the whereabouts of the Unusual Hilichurl.\nAfter completing requests for hilichurls, they will inform you of the time period during which the Unusual Hilichurl will be active, and also indicate the approximate location. Track down and defeat the Unusual Hilichurl at these times to safeguard the merchant route from this potential threat.\nIf you encounter any unfamiliar items of Hilichurlian vocabulary while communicating with the hilichurls, simply check the dictionary in the "Handy Handbook of Hilichurlian" kindly provided by Ella Musk.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 to take part in the "Mimi Tomo" event. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n近来，据说有一个「奇怪的丘丘人」正在商道附近活动，引起了过路行商的警惕。\n冒险家协会的凯瑟琳请旅行者帮忙调查「奇怪的丘丘人」。旅行者需要在丘丘语专家艾拉·马斯克的帮助下寻找可以沟通的丘丘人，向它们打听「奇怪的丘丘人」的出没线索。\n完成了丘丘人的请求后，它们会将「奇怪的丘丘人」出没的时间告诉旅行者，并指出大致的地点。旅行者需要在正确的时间段找到并击败「奇怪的丘丘人」，为商路清理可能的威胁。\n如果在沟通过程中，遇到了不熟悉的丘丘语，可以在艾拉·马斯克提供的《丘丘语速查手册》中查阅词汇。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，可以参与「折箭觅踪」活动。
- This is a pretty good spot, right? ｜ 这个地方感觉不错吧？
- Before this Round ends, the target character's next 3 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Normal Attacks</color> cost 1 less $[K309].\n(A character can consume at most 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3101}Food per Round) ｜ 目标角色在本回合结束前，之后三次<color=#FFFFFFFF>「普通攻击」</color>都少花费1个$[K309]。\n（每回合每个角色最多食用1次「{SPRITE_PRESET#3101}料理」）
- If it weren't for my parents not letting me, I would probably be on the other side of the sea already... ｜ 要不是因为爸妈不让我出国，我现在已经在海的对岸了吧…
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After either side uses a Skill:</color> If $[K100] or $[K5] was dealt, or an <color=#FFFFFFFF>Elemental Reaction</color> was triggered, this card gains 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Inspiration</color>.\nWhen this card gains 3 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Inspiration</color>, then discard this card and draw 2 cards. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>双方角色使用技能后：</color>如果造成了$[K100]、$[K5]或引发了<color=#FFFFFFFF>元素反应</color>，此牌累积1个<color=#FFFFFFFF>「灵感」</color>。如果此牌已累积3个<color=#FFFFFFFF>「灵感」</color>，则弃置此牌并抓2张牌。

- Don't say that about yourself, dear sir! You're sincere and kind-hearted, so you're definitely a good person. Maybe we'll enlist your help in the future. ｜ 别这么说自己！亲爱的先生，您既真诚，又有热心肠，绝对是个好人！说不定以后我们还会请您来帮忙啊。
- Careful now... Let's not get busted at the last hurdle! ｜ 小心…不要在最后关头被抓到啦。

- I knew it'd be harder than I had expected. ｜ 果然比我预想中难多了。

- A low-pitched horn model shaped like a massive serpent, with a knob to control the pitch. It has the same design as the low-pitched horn model found in the Faded Castle.\nIt is said that though this horn has a very exaggerated appearance, its tones are like those of a serpent hidden in the brush. The sound is mellow and full, with a low key, and is not easily noticed. Many artists take advantage of this characteristic by skillfully inserting it into the accompaniment to create a tense atmosphere and a sense of impending danger... ｜ 外形如同巨蛇的低音号模型，号管上装有控制音高的阀键，与褪色古堡内的低音号模型形制相同。\n据说，虽然这种低音号有着极为夸张的外形，但音色却如同隐藏于树丛中的游蛇，圆润且低调，不易被人关注。因此，部分艺术家会用这种特性，将其巧妙地插入伴奏，渲染紧张危险的氛围…
- Paimon bought them when we were reading at the bookshop in the city earlier. Pretty cool, huh? ｜ 我们在城里逛街看书的时候，我顺手就买了，感觉很帅！
- The Children of Echoes? Ah, this is the tribe right here. ｜ 你说「回声之子」？喏，就是这里了。
- Um, you do have a point. We'll be friends once Paimon returns the favor by coming up with an ugly nickname for you! Hehe. ｜ 唔…只有斯露莎单方面给我起绰号确实不算混熟了，应该礼尚往来，我也给斯露莎起一个难听的绰号，这样就对了！嘿嘿。
- *sigh* I wonder how long I can last... Or when that boy will finally grow up... ｜ 唉，也不知道我这把老骨头能折腾几年，玛文到底什么时候才能懂事点呢…
- Too many appetizers before the dish ruins the mood, but just for today, I can entertain an early platter. ｜ 正餐之前吃得太多可能有损胃口，不过事到如今或许也不必再讲究。

- Whew, you had me worried there! I thought we'd been found out... We'd be in real trouble if Pacal ever got wind of it. ｜ 呼啊…你吓死我了！我还以为被发现了…要是事情捅到帕加尔那边去，那就糟糕了…

- In my opinion, Ororon's true personality is very different from what he projects on the outside — like lava covered in ice. His tribe and his friends bring him peace, but his drive to protect them and his need to become a hero leave him restless. It's inadvisable to act on impulse, but these are precious qualities all the same. ｜ 在我看来，他的真实性格和外在表现出的东西相去甚远，他就像是一块被冰块包裹的熔岩，让他冷静下来的东西是族人与朋友，让他躁动不安的则是守护他们的冲动，与成为英雄的使命感…这种情绪并不理智，但又难能可贵。
- And you, machine. Your memories are nothing but carvings on gemstones, your wisdom just a simulation created by tape, gears, and crystalline pipelines. ｜ 还有你，机器。你的记忆不过是宝石上的刻痕，而你的智慧也不过是胶带、齿轮与晶体管的逻辑模拟罢了。
- Thanks! This is my specialty, after all — not that it's good for anything outside these competitions. ｜ 谢谢，毕竟这是我擅长的事嘛，只不过，胃口很大这种事除了参加比赛，好像也没什么值得炫耀的。

- Lyney knocked Cowell out ｜ 林尼打晕考威尔
- I remember you. ｜ 我记得你。
- It wouldn't hurt to take a look. ｜ 看看情况再决定也不迟。

- Most of the objects from that time were lost to the sea, but the gigantic waves created by the Overlord of the Vortex have given those sunken objects a chance to see the light of day again. ｜ 与那段历史有关的物件大多沉于深海，但「漩涡之魔神」掀起了滔天巨浪，也给了这些东西重见天日的机会。

- High elemental concentrations have resulted in the creation of this floating creature. <color=#FFE14BFF>When it takes a single grievous hit, it will build Fury</color>. When a Specter hits maximum Fury, it will expand, becoming larger and stronger, and it will explode violently when defeated. ｜ 高浓度的元素孕育而生的魔物，具有飘浮在空中的力量。<color=#FFE14BFF>受到严重的单次伤害时，会积攒「怒气」</color>。怒气充满时，飘浮灵会「膨胀」，变得更加强大，并在被击败时剧烈爆炸。
- Gambler's Brooch ｜ 赌徒的胸花

- Come on, not you too! Paimon never said that she'd bite anyway! ｜ 怎么你也这样子啦！我又没说我会咬人！！

- Yep, the same paper slips as the ones I gave to the kids earlier. Whenever a customer orders fireworks for a commemorative event, we always include a little paper slip with the goods. ｜ 嗯，之前孩子们拿到的也是同样的东西。只要是想要纪念某件事而来定做烟花的客人，我们家就会附赠一张纸条。
- *sigh* It's all getting less and less clear now... Everything's getting foggier and foggier... ｜ 唉…越来越不清楚了…越来越记不清事情了呀…

- The way you keep talking... ｜ 叽叽喳喳的地方很像…
- Oh, thank you, that's very nice of you... It has been quite a while since we last met, hasn't it? ｜ 欸？谢谢…这么一说，确实有段时间没和你见面了。

- "I am the Raiden Shogun. I am currently being held hostage by the Crux Fleet and urgently need 200,000 Mora to secure my release. Please place the ransom Mora on the north coast of the deserted island. When all of this is over, I will promote you to General of the Tenryou Commission." ｜ 「我是雷电将军，现在被南十字船队绑架，急需二十万摩拉赎金，请把赎金放在荒岛北边的海岸上，等我自由，让你做天领奉行大将。」
- No, I'm not the Master. I'm just a volunteer that helps take care of her more trivial matters, which oftentimes ends up being an arduous and thankless task. ｜ 我并不是分会长，只是自愿帮她承担这些琐碎的事…虽然有些吃力不讨好。
- I don't think this is a matter of height... ｜ 和个子高矮应该没有关系…
- He seems like a great guy! Everything he said was thoughtful and logical and... he was just a pleasure to listen to! ｜ 感觉是一个很好相处的人呢！说话也很有条理，让人听着很舒服！
- Got it! ｜ 收到！
- Doing fine so far. ｜ 似乎还好。
- Could it be that the fog that shrouds the island found its way into Ryuuji's head after he breathed too much of it in? ｜ 会不会是因为…鹤观是沉没在雾海中的岛屿，所以龙二吸入了太多的雾，而雾气在脑子里积聚…
- Ah... I wish we could have spent some more time here. ｜ 真舍不得回去…

- When drawing Combat Units or Stratagems during the preparation phase at the start of each round, gain <color=#FF8126FF>1 extra chance to refresh</color>.\nEach time you draw a Combat Unit, <color=#FF8126FF>1 random choice will have its initial Lv. increased by 3</color>. ｜ 每回合准备阶段抽选交战单位或战斗策略时，额外获得<color=#FF8126FF>1次刷新机会</color>。\n每次抽选交战单位时，都使<color=#FF8126FF>随机1个选项的初始等级+3</color>。

- An earring that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.\nThe red symbol upon it resembles the image in her eyes, a declaration and a rejection alike.\nThe orphaned live lives filled with suffering from childhood — this she sees and keeps in her heart.\nAs fate casts an examining eye on humanity, so too will humans cast judgment upon fate. ｜ 完成与「仆人」的决斗后，在废墟中拾起的耳钉。\n红色的符号如同她眼中的图案，既是申敕也是否决。\n失怙失恃的孩子们自幼就蒙受诸般苦难，这些她都记在心底。\n命运审视人间，亦将有人审视命运。
- If you have the time, I encourage you to take a look around. I hope you'll find it a worthwhile experience. Now, Lisa — what was the Grand Master's message to you about? ｜ 有空时就去逛逛吧，希望你们能有所收获。对了，丽莎，大团长给你的留言说了什么事吗？
- This power doth the adepti of Liyue name "Gusto"... ｜ 此乃璃月仙人所授「气劲」…
- Max HP increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Once every 15s, for the 14s after using an Elemental Skill: Gain 4 Scorching Summer stacks. Each stack increases Normal Attack DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>. For the duration of the effect, once every 1.5s, lose 1 stack after a Normal Attack hits an opponent; once every 1.5s, gain 1 stack after triggering a Vaporize reaction on an opponent. Max 4 Scorching Summer stacks. ｜ 生命值上限提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。每15秒一次，施放元素战技后的14秒内，产生如下效果：获得4层「炽夏」，每层使普通攻击造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>。持续期间内，每1.5秒一次：普通攻击命中敌人后，移除1层；每1.5秒一次：对敌人触发蒸发反应后，增加1层。「炽夏」效果至多叠加4层。

- Good Night ｜ 晚安…

- I have asked my parents, and they say that there are still two shrines around here. One is near Komore Teahouse, and the other one is on the way out of the city. ｜ 我问过爸爸和妈妈了，这附近还有两个神龛，一个在木漏茶室附近，一个在出城的路上。
- It's all nonsense. I hunt best — and fastest — with my bow! ｜ 明明就是我自己用弓箭捕猎来得更快一点！
- Whoa... These lines here are so illegible that Paimon can't understand it one bit! ｜ 呜哇…下面这几行字儿歪歪扭扭的，根本看不懂写了什么！
- Eh, it's already been a few days and he still hasn't come back to claim them. Who knows, maybe he left them here on purpose... ｜ 都好几天了，他也不来认领…不过，说不定是那个人故意留在这里的…
- Dear father... Defeated a group of slimes... Here's hoping that's the last Dawn Winery sees of them... ｜ 消灭了许多史莱姆…希望晨曦酒庄不会再被史莱姆骚扰…
- She is the one that's been causing our forces so much trouble. The fact the resistance has even held out for this long is thanks to her. ｜ 毕竟她确实给我们幕府军造成了很大麻烦，反抗军能够支撑到现在，也有她的功劳。

- "Do you remember Luhua Pool near Liyue Harbor? It's the place with two giant statues."\n"An author wanted to write an absurdist novel based on them."\n"I remember parts of the plot — the two statues each had only one eye on their heads. These eyes could not be seen clearly while in their vicinity, but could be observed from far away."\n"Upon hearing this tale, a painter went to Luhua Pool to sketch them."\n"But after he finished the work, he started having eerie nightmares."\n"In those dreams, he kneels in front of the statues, carving something onto gemstone..."\n"Whoa, stop it... You're giving me goosebumps..." ｜ 「你还记得璃月港的渌华池吗？就是旁边立着两尊超大雕像的那个地方。」\n「一位老师想要以那两尊雕像为切入点，写一本怪诞小说呢。」\n「我记得，其中的一个情节是，那两尊雕像头上各有一枚独眼，但在近处完全看不清，离得远了反而能看得很清晰。」\n「一个听说了这种传闻的画家就前去渌华池，想要用画面来记录这两尊雕像。」\n「但自从他画完这两尊雕像之后，每天晚上都会做一个怪异的梦。」\n「在梦里，他一直跪坐在那两尊雕像前面，手里在不停地刻着一枚宝石…」\n「呜哇，不能往下说了…我鸡皮疙瘩都起来了…」

- A carving purchased from Acara Crafts that happens to look like someone you know quite well. Her friendliness and kindliness really fit well on an Aranara's form, lifting the spirits of those who look upon the figure with an inner warmth.\nAfter their initial success, Acara Crafts has been making constant improvements to their art of creating Aranara Carvings, experimenting with various colors and design combinations — all part of some happy coincidence, perhaps.\nTo that friend of yours who came to Port Ormos on her trip, this carving encapsulates the precious memory of your journey together, and the fun you had while traveling across Sumeru. Paimon has thought this aloud at least once after you obtained this unique carving: "Maybe we'll really see this Aranara in our dreams if we place this carving by the bedside!" ｜ 从「阿折罗造像」购买的，形似某位熟人的木刻。她的亲切与热情，就算套用在兰那罗的形象上也显得非常合适，能让人感到愉悦和温暖。\n获得了最初的成功之后，「阿折罗造像」一直在不断改进「兰那罗木刻」的制造工艺，并尝试多种色彩与造型的搭配，或许这一定程度上促成了美好的巧合。\n对于来到奥摩斯港游玩的那位熟人而言，这件木刻蕴藏着她与你们同行，在须弥尽情游玩的珍贵回忆。有了这个独特的木刻后，派蒙也在开心地思索：「不知道把这种兰那罗木刻摆在床头，会不会真的梦见一样的兰那罗呢！」
- He withdrew from this round. ｜ 提纳里弃赛了。
- ...I see, I think I understand the situation now. In that case, Ganyu, shall we divide the work between us? ｜ …原来是这样，我明白现状了。甘雨，我们不如兵分两路？
- About Iron Chunks... ｜ 关于铁块…
- Though the Tengu-Kin have long been banned for flouting public order and morals, some still hold the Hyakunin Ikki free-for-all tournament from time to time. ｜ 虽然「天狗党」早已因为有违公序良俗而被取缔，但不时还会有人秘密举办百人一揆的乱斗大会。

- The ninjutsu that Sayu has learned is not very powerful in combat, but it is quite useful in the matter of slacking off.\nShe is extremely skilled at hiding and covering her tracks, and is an expert in this area. Therefore, if she has the intention to hide, ordinary people absolutely cannot find her.\nHowever, even the most ingenious puzzles have answers, and even the most elusive treasures have clues for people to find them. This also holds true for Sayu.\nAfter spending enough time with Sayu, one will understand her habits and preferences. Trying to find her doesn't seem so difficult anymore.\nFor example, if you go to Sayu's room early in the morning and lift the covers, the odds are that you will find her in bed.\nAt noon, you can check out the trees near the shrine and who knows, you may find something unexpected.\nIt will be more challenging to find Sayu at night, but it's a good idea to go to her house and wait for her to emerge.\nHowever, please remember not to disturb Sayu, who is busy growing taller, unless it is absolutely necessary.\nEven gentle rabbits bite when provoked, let alone Sayu... ｜ 早柚所学的忍术虽然战斗力不高，在偷懒一事上却有相当的妙用。\n她极擅长隐匿身形、消除痕迹，是这方面的专家。所以，若她有心躲藏，普通人绝对找不到。\n不过，再巧妙的谜题也有答案，再隐秘的宝藏也有线索，早柚亦是如此。\n相处久了，便会明白早柚的习惯和偏好。想找到她，似乎也不那么困难了。\n例如，清晨去早柚的房间掀起被子，大概率能找到赖床的她。\n中午时分，可以去神社附近的树上瞧瞧，说不定会有意外收获。\n晚上寻找早柚的难度会增大，不过，去她屋里守株待兔着实是个好办法。\n但切记，如非必要情况，请务必不要打扰正忙于长高的早柚。\n兔子急了还会咬人，早柚急了…说不定也一样哦？

She offered me some of her face powder last time I saw her, but I didn't have the time to go fetch it. So I told her to give it to Candace instead. Hmm... I wonder how she's liking it? I need to go check sometime... ｜ 解决了那件事之后，妮露也能更加自由地跳舞了吧。哦她上次还说，要把自己用的香粉捎一份给我，但我经常在外面奔波，就只能让她先送去坎蒂丝那里。唔…我也该找个时间过去看看了。

- Medium-sized, round fish with horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters and drive away creatures that try to harm them. \nSpecimens with a greenish tint are the common species in this lineage. They look like an unripe fruit on a tree branch, hence the nickname "True Fruit." \nHowever, there are very few bones in this fish. The meat is fatty and rich, but if it's not handled properly, or you remove its gallbladder too late, the fish's meat will be as sour as unripe fruit. Therefore, "making this fish delicious" has become the standard by which all chefs are measured. ｜ 体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n体表呈现出青绿色彩的角鲀是这一谱系中最常见的品种，状如枝头尚未成熟的果实，因而得名「真果」。\n虽说这种角鲀鱼刺极少，肉质肥美，但要是处理的方式不当，或是摘除胆囊的时间较晚，鱼肉就会像未熟果实般的酸涩。因此，「能否制作鲜美的角鲀料理」也成了衡量须弥厨师技艺的标准之一。
- Oh, you're amazing, Paimon! It looks like I still have a lot of learning to do. ｜ 不愧是派蒙，看来我平时钻研得还不够多。

- Summons a "Bake-Kurage" created from water that can heal her allies.\nUsing this skill will apply the <color=#80C0FFFF>Wet</color> status to Sangonomiya Kokomi.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Bake-Kurage</color>\nDeals <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color> to surrounding opponents and heals nearby active characters at fixed intervals. This healing is based on Kokomi's Max HP.\n\n<i>Kokomi needs timely "refreshment" in order to maintain optimal work efficiency</i>. ｜ 召唤能够治愈同伴的幻造水之生命「化海月」。\n施放的瞬间，为珊瑚宫心海施加<color=#80C0FFFF>潮湿</color>状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>化海月</color>\n每隔一段时间，对周围的敌人造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>，并为周围的当前场上角色恢复生命值，回复量受益于珊瑚宫心海的生命值上限。\n\n<i>为了保持完美的工作状态，心海需要及时补充自己的「能量」。</i>

### Part 184

- A uniquely designed single-armed crane that can be found in Fontaine's harbors. It has modular components and can carry all manner of items safely, whether they be heavy or light. While the cost of building this item is not insignificant and it can be quite tough to assemble and adjust, its excellent performance has made it a mainstay for moving loads in Fontainian harbors.\nIt is said when this machine type was first placed in Lumidouce Harbor, it completed a full day's workload work in half a day, and soon after, it became more and more common throughout Fontaine's harbors... ｜ 可见于枫丹港口的单臂式起重机，有着奇妙的机械结构，能够切换内部机件的组合，稳定装卸极重或极轻的物件。虽然造价不菲，组装和调试也颇为麻烦，但这型机关仍凭借着优秀的性能成为了枫丹港口起重业务的中流砥柱。\n据说，这型机关最初被布置在柔灯港时，仅用半天就完成了当日计划中的任务，很快，它们便在枫丹的各个港口普及开来…

- A vishap that dwells deep beneath the oceans. Due to certain social adaptations, it has manifested a form aligned with the Cryo element.\nThe coming of humans sparked a conflict and a resultant evolution within the Bathysmal Vishaps, just as ants might divide up labor and biological characteristics, thus appearing in different forms. These vishaps are stronger than their ordinary kin. ｜ 生活在海渊之下的龙蜥。因为社会分工，而出现了冰元素的形态。\n人类的到来引发了对抗，深海龙蜥开始了进化。正如蚂蚁会因性别和分工不同，而产生不同形态。这些龙蜥比起普通深海龙蜥更加强大。

- Freminet is not a good speaker, but people who are familiar with him know that his distant demeanor hides a pure soul.\nHe does not enjoy the spotlight. The gazes, reactions, and comments of others risk running his breathing ragged.\nAs an exceptional diver, he is more used to hiding on the silent seabed, pouring his soul out to, and sharing warmth with, the Romaritime Flowers in that weightless world.\nUnlike other divers, this introvert does not accept external commissions. He belongs only to Hotel Bouffes d'ete and to his precious family members who live there. ｜ 菲米尼不善言谈，但熟悉他的人知道，那寒冰般拒人千里的外表下有一颗纯真腼腆的心灵。\n他不爱站立在灯光之下。他人的目光、反应与评价总会让菲米尼的呼吸节奏变得紊乱。\n作为一名出色的潜水员，他更习惯蜷身于幽静的海床，在轻微的失重感中向海露花吐露心事，分享彼此的温度。\n不同于其他潜水员，内向的菲米尼从不接受来自外界的委托。他只属于「布法蒂公馆」，属于公馆里他珍贵的家人们。
- Oh, there's no need to trouble you, great Dendro Archon. I imagine you must have many other important things to deal with. ｜ 这种事不方便麻烦草神大人，您应该还有很多事情要忙。

During the challenge, the Large Cryo Slimes will neither attack nor die and will continuously affect themselves with Cryo.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color> \nSayu \n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 苍色浪纹疾驰</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中的大型冰史莱姆不会攻击或死亡，持续为自身附着冰元素。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n早柚\n\n\n

- I had a hunter who's quick on his feet run back to Springvale to find help, and sent a few veteran hunters into the gorge to look for Draff, but... ｜ 我让一位腿脚快的猎人回去清泉镇找人来帮忙，又让另外几个身手好的猎人尝试进去找找杜拉夫先生了，但是…

- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- I am indeed somewhat older than my appearance might suggest. But when I came into being, Khaenri'ah had already been destroyed. I have no memories of it. ｜ 我确实比看起来要年长一些。不过我出生时，坎瑞亚已经覆灭了，我没有关于那里的回忆。
- A bulk-manufactured awning produced with the assistance of clockwork meka that, theoretically, should be in the royal purple-blue hue of a Lumidouce Bell. In reality, most of those who see it have the same reaction: "It's obviously cyan!"\nThe reason for that is simple: When the clockwork meka was dyeing the material, a deviation occurred that never would have happened with human artisans. The clockwork meka used can only follow commands and repeat the production process, with no one to verify the final results of the dyeing process. The workers assembling the awnings afterward just followed their instructions and also failed to notice the color issue. When the designer finally saw the finished product, such a large quantity had already been produced as to making scrapping the project unfeasible. After making sure there were no quality issues, they were sold normally.\nThis case became the subject of a paper from a certain research team at the Fontaine Research Institute, and subsequently became a key argument for the necessity of human supervision in clockwork meka-assisted production. ｜ 应用发条机关辅助生产，批量制造的棚屋，理论上，应当呈现出柔灯铃般的蓝紫色，实际上，大部分见过它的人都是同一个反应——「它显然是青色的啊！」\n造成这种现象的原因非常简单，利用发条机关染制布料时，出现了人工干预下不会如此夸张的「色差」。目前的发条机关只会根据指令不断重复生产流程，更改染色成分后的效果无人验证，而后续组装棚屋的工人对照着白纸黑字简略图的说明书，也没有察觉到布料染色的问题。等到设计师看到成品时，这种棚屋的生产数量已容不得报废了，在确认这组棚屋没有质量问题后，商家还是正常将其出售了。\n这一案例被枫丹科学院的某个研究组专门写进了论文，并当成了人工监督发条机关生产流程必要性的关键论据之一。
- We can't let him leave while he's in such a bad state... ｜ 不能让手岛先生就这么失魂落魄地离开…
- ...Ms. Kaia, did you put some kind of special Sumeru shrooms in your soup? You know, the sort that might make people want to turn their lives around in the blink of an eye? ｜ …迦雅小姐，您的汤里，是否放了某些须弥的特色蘑菇？能让人眨眼间就回心转意的那种？
- Finally, Cyrus said, this monster waits for the perfect opportunity to strike. As soon as you let your guard down, even for a split second, it unleashes its ferocious attack. ｜ 而且塞琉斯先生还说，那个怪物还会伺机而动，只要有刹那放松，就会被它狠狠地击垮。
- Well, where shall we go next? ｜ 接下来去哪？
- Eating ｜ 吃
- It's not nice to lie to people, but.... Paimon's gotta admit, that was a really good story, Florian. Oh, and nice improvisation, Clorinde! ｜ 骗人很可恶，但弗洛莱恩编故事好厉害。克洛琳德的临场发挥也是！
- A powerful warrior from the Canopy, whose bravery has been acknowledged and for which they may wear the Saurian Crown.\nA warrior who can use a grappling hook to extend their attack range. Following intricate mechanical tinkering, the handcannon they wield can be fired using said grappling hook. For the Saurian-Crowned warriors of the Scions of the Canopy, refining one's skills and thought is more important than training the spirit and will. ｜ 来自悬木之里，勇武受到认可，得以获授龙冠的强大武士。\n能够借助钩绳延展攻击范围的武者。经过精巧机关的组装后，其手中的手砲可以利用钩绳触动发射。对于「悬木人」部族的龙冠武士们来说，更重要的不是对精神和意志的锤炼，而是对技艺与思绪的精研。
- I might not have recovered yet... ｜ 我可能还没恢复好…
- Please, Barbara-sama, teach me your style! How can I be more like you? ｜ 芭芭拉小姐！请教教我，怎么样才能有你这样的风度吧！

- Taller than a house? I've never heard of a ninjutsu like that... ｜ 比屋子还高…怎么可能有这种忍术？
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- Hang on, since you owe the International Trade Association money, how do you plan to pay us? ｜ 等等，你既然还欠着万国商会的摩拉，哪还有那么多报酬来进行委托？
- Sure, that sounds fine! ｜ 嗯嗯！这还差不多嘛…
- As to their level of seriousness... Well, let me put it this way, they probably wouldn't even flinch if I said that to their face. ｜ 要说程度…哦，应该这么形容。他已经正经到被当面这样评价表情也完全不会变化的地步了。
- I lost... But my spirit remains undaunted! ｜ 我输了…但我的精神是不败的！
- He wasn't kidding when he said he was prepared... Did you see the way he whipped out that reply without even reading the letter? ｜ 居然看都不看信就把回信掏出来了…看来果然是「早有准备」呢。
- There are critical junctures in life, and if you don't seize the chance to act, there's no going back. ｜ 我总算是认清了，某些关键的抉择，只要错过那个时机就再也无法弥补。
- A Ley Line disturbance. Certain presences have been forced to wander outside their rightful realm. ｜ 地脉紊乱，有些不该留在外面的东西仍在徘徊。
- Ugh, alright then... But be warned, Paimon has no idea what she'll catch, if anything! ｜ 那好吧…不过先说好了，我都不知道自己能钓起来什么东西！
- Greetings. ｜ 你们好。
- Wow, that was super quick! ｜ 呜哇，好快！
- Not Activated ｜ 未激活
- The submerged old city of the Court of Fontaine lies in the waters nearby. The underwater ruins are quite convoluted, so if you would like to go exploring, stay on your guard and be sure to bring reliable equipment. ｜ 枫丹廷附近的水域下方，有着被淹没的旧城区。水下的废墟错综复杂，若是想去探险，请别掉以轻心，最好准备好可靠的装备。
- Huh? ｜ 哎？
- You see the youkai off as they gather and ascend, reveling all the way. To help them go on their way in peace, you recite the incantation in earnest together with Miko, as do those readers who believe in The Secret Spells of Lady Kitsune. As you bless them, these beings who once fought so courageously in this land leave it once more with carefree hearts. ｜ 你们目送妖怪们的记忆聚集起来、升上天空，尽情笑闹。为了让他们安心离去，你们虔诚地跟着神子念诵起来，而稻妻城内所有相信「狐狸小姐秘传术法」的读者也在认真地念诵着所谓的咒语。伴随着你们的祝颂之声，曾经在这片土地上奋勇战斗的他们，再次潇洒地离去了。

- C—Could this be where the "strongest" resides? ｜ 难、难道说，这里就是「最强」的所在？
- Look, those are materials that we can use for the crown, right? Let's get some for Freminet. ｜ 快看，那个就是可以用来制作王冠的材料吧？我们去捡一点。
- Select a Mystic Art ｜ 选择一个玄术
- Xilonen, stop the test! We've already confirmed what we came here for! ｜ 检查已经完成了，希诺宁，赶紧停下来！
- But if we want to compare the atmosphere, I'd say that there's some difference between the festivities now and the ones back home... ｜ 但如果就气氛而言的话，还是和蒙德城的风花节略有差别的…
- Ah! Arakaya didn't say anything! ｜ 唔！兰卡亚什么都没说！
- When you run into problems, you really ought to ask for help, you know. I've been around the block, don't you think it would have made sense to involve me? And let's not forget, I know the desert like the back of my hand... ｜ 遇到事情可以求助的嘛，前辈我不就是一个很好的帮手？再说，我还对沙漠非常有心得呢。
- After a Pinball hits the bar and causes an Electro-Charged reaction, the <color=#F39000>Surge</color> effect will be applied, unleashing lightning from the struck brick that randomly <color=#F39000>deals DMG within a fixed AoE</color> to surrounding bricks. ｜ 「弹球」与弹板发生感电反应后，将附加破坏效果<color=#F39000>「馈电」</color>：命中节奏方块时，将释放电弧，对<color=#F39000>一定范围内</color>的节奏方块随机<color=#F39000>造成伤害</color>。
- Flower of Creviced Cliff ｜ 磐陀裂生之花
- If Fontaine's authorities raided this place before, why didn't they find this? ｜ 如果这里曾经被枫丹官方查抄过的话，为什么藏在书里的钥匙一直没有被发现呢？

- Ohh! Paimon gets it now. So whoever first planted that Rainbow Rose was probably the killer! ｜ 哦！也就是说只要知道谁家种了这种品种，他就很有可能是犯人对吧！

- With my skills and experience on your team, they don't stand a chance, no matter what they throw at us. ｜ 相信我的技巧与经验吧，有我在队伍里，对付它们不成问题。

- While exploring within King Deshret's ruins, you may encounter platforms with unique etchings on them. These platforms are named Illusory Keystones, and when stepped on, they will disappear. Do not hesitate when you step over them — press on! ｜ 在赤王遗迹中冒险时，有时会遇见有着特殊纹样的地板。这种地板被称作幻象基石，当踏足其上一段时间后会消失无踪。所以不要犹豫，快速通过吧。

- ...People grow by learning from their mistakes. I hope this will be a valuable lesson to them. ｜ …人总是要尝到教训才能成长，希望这次的事情能给他们提个醒。

- Why, what's it to you? ...Anyway, she preferred me not to use her full name — too formal, she'd say. So I called her by her nickname. ｜ 你问这个做什么…她平时都不乐意我叫她大名，说太生分了，所以我一直叫她的小名。
- Yes. Perhaps if it were better maintained, then it could fetch a decent price. However, I doubt it could be sold in its current condition. ｜ 嗯，如果保养状态好一点的话，说不定还能卖出价钱，现在这样是肯定不行了。
- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 6):\nThe scene revolves around members of the Tabletop Troupe taking part in an activity together. Guided by their Game Master, Clorinde, they encounter a <color=#e5870a>merchant</color>, a <color=#e5870a>Sternshield Crab</color> blocking their path, and a <color=#e5870a>Cryo Regisvine</color> guarding some treasure, in <color=#e5870a>that order</color>. Navia, who is playing an Adventurer, will attempt to use <color=#e5870a>"Persuasion"</color> in each encounter. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第6镜）：\n展现桌上剧团成员们一同进行活动时的场景。在克洛琳德饰演的主持人的引导下，众人<color=#e5870a>依次</color>与<color=#e5870a>商人</color>，挡路的<color=#e5870a>坚盾重甲蟹</color>和守护宝藏的<color=#e5870a>急冻树</color>遭遇。而在每一次遭遇中，娜维娅饰演的冒险家均会尝试对对方使用<color=#e5870a>「说服」</color>。
- Lv. {0}: {1} ｜ {0}级：{1}
- I finally decided to post a Cuisine Commission at the Adventurers' Guild a few days ago but there hasn't been any response... ｜ 我前几天都狠下心来，去冒险家协会挂了一道「烹饪委托」，但到现在也没回音…
- Nonsense! I was merely cautioning Sefana not to fail in her duty. ｜ 胡乱猜测！吾只是在述说瑟法娜的职责，给她警示罢了！
- It's a Narukami Island custom! ｜ 是鸣神岛的风俗！
- Let's take a quick gander back to our original topic... ｜ 那就往回掰一掰话题…
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>250–550</color> HP. ｜ 为其恢复<color=#3399CCFF>250-550</color>点生命值。
- My master once said that the day I learn how to use my strength for the good of others is the day that I can truly become part of human society. ｜ 师父曾说，什么时候我懂得为他人使用力量，什么时候我才能真正融入人类社会。
- Aye... I still feel the sadness now that I remember it, even after all this time. ｜ 是啊，我重新想起了这一切，仍然会为此感到伤心。
- My good friends. ｜ 我的好朋友。
- That how it is? Haha, then I guess Researcher Persikov's gonna have to pay that toll. ｜ 是嘛，嘿嘿，这下那个佩尔西科夫研究员恐怕要吃苦头了。

- Primordial Jade Cutter ｜ 磐岩结绿
- One senses the presence of a Sigil of Permission... ｜ 唔…「百无禁忌箓」的气息。
- A mural that you found on a stone wall on Minacious Isle. It seems to depict a shipwreck... ｜ 从「危危岛」的石壁上记录下来的壁画。画中似乎描绘着一场海难…
- You are finally seeing reality clearly. ｜ 你终于可以看清事实了。
- The Mikage Furnace is back to normal already, huh... ｜ 「御影炉心」已经恢复正常了吗…

- The people of Tsurumi Island believe that the souls of those who depart from the fog will be lost. ｜ 鹤观的人相信，只要离开迷雾，他们的灵魂就会迷失。

- Azhdaha was unable to unseal itself in the end, and the quaking earth was at last put to rest.\nYet the memories of facing the sealed dragon in the heart of the earth itself remain ever so vivid.\nChallenge it in your memories once more, and you may gain something new from that encounter... ｜ 若陀龙王最终未能得到解放，隐隐骚动的大地重归平静。\n然而在地心岩窟中，直面被封印的岩龙的记忆再度浮现。\n在回忆中再现这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…

- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Alright, on to our next stop! ｜ 好，出发去下一站啦。
- That's a good thing. Oh, and feel free to call me Mavuika. It's what all my friends call me, and I like it that way. ｜ 这样才更好，对了，你们可以直接叫我玛薇卡，我的好朋友都会这么叫我，我还是喜欢这个名字。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Have you ever had one of those super scary nightmares, {NICKNAME}?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Um, I've dreamed of falling through endless darkness...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Without a wind glider.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Eek...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I've also dreamed of my sister walking away from me, while I'm unable to catch up to her no matter how fast I run.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...She tells me that I've "come too late."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Yours are quite different from the ones that Paimon's had.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon's scariest dream was being eaten by a super giant slime. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你做过什么超恐怖级别的噩梦吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>唔，我梦见过自己在无边的黑暗中坠落…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>没带风之翼。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哇…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>还梦见过妹妹头也不回地往前走，我怎么追赶都抓不住她。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>…她说我「来得太晚了」。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>跟我的情况不太一样呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我梦见过最恐怖的事情，是被超巨大的史莱姆吞进肚子里。

- Party members other than the equipping character will provide the equipping character with buffs based on whether their Elemental Type is the same as the latter or not. If their Elemental Types are the same, increase Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>48</color>. If not, increase the equipping character's DMG Bonus from their Elemental Type by <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>. The aforementioned effects can have 3 stacks. Additionally, all nearby party members other than the equipping character will have their Elemental Mastery increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>44</color>. Multiple such effects from multiple such weapons can stack. ｜ 队伍中每个其他角色，都会依据元素类型与装备者相同与否，为装备者提供提升效果。相同：元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>48</color>点；不同：装备者元素类型的元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>。上述提升效果每种至多叠加3层。此外，队伍中装备者以外的附近角色的元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>44</color>点，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。

Of course, the ingredients that Bernhard has purchased are indeed safe and fresh. "Even Paimon, whose nose is even sharper than that of a Northland Hound, cannot for the life of her detect anything wrong. She was even worried that we might not be able to bring the best out of such good ingredients."\n"Not that she's got anything to worry about with me at the helm. She can just focus on hollering and shouting — you know, attracting more customers." ｜ 以「果酒湖蓝」为主色调的店铺顶棚，具有纯净、清新的观感，像是给了客人「食材绝对干净、安全」的暗示。当然，伯恩哈德采购的各种原料都绝对安全新鲜。「即使是对食物的嗅觉比北地犬还灵敏的派蒙，也挑不出任何毛病。派蒙反而开始担心，我们的小吃能不能把这么好的食材的味道都发挥出来…」\n「不过这种担心是多余的，反正下厨的主力是我，派蒙只需要好好吆喝，吸引更多顾客就好了！」

- For people like us, who are constantly in conflict. That is a pure land of peace, a utopia created by the very first human to use phlogiston. ｜ 对于时刻都在处于纷争中的纳塔人来说，那里就像唯一的净土一样，当然了这个净土的创造者，就是第一个会用燃素的人类。
- La Chanson d'Erinnyes (II) ｜ 伊黎耶之歌·中本
- On the Hotel Bouffes d'ete's Founding Day, all the children were abustle, draping festive colors all over the place.\nTo the residents, outside festivals and events were cold and emotionless things, foreign elements in their lives, and only this dwelling could bring them true warmth.\nEveryone worked in concert to execute Lyney's plan. Lynette had purchased large amounts of festive ornaments, and together with the other children, she strung up colored streamers and hung handwritten festive greetings.\nFreminet was ensuring that the magical props would operate properly — Lyney had faith in his craftsmanship, so much so that Freminet was completely entrusted with all the magic props this time.\nLyney himself was the busiest of all — not only did he have to ascertain everyone's progress, but he was also laying the final groundwork for a grand, unique magic trick in secret.\nAnd thus was the banquet successfully held with everyone's support. The children danced to the joyous music playing from the grand hall's phonograph and enjoyed delicious food — this was the birthday of no one in particular, but this was the day they all felt they had gained new lives.\nThe finale, of course, was Lyney, Lynette, and Freminet's Founding Day magic show. The magic box was at the center of the room, and all waited with bated breath.\nTo preserve the secret behind the magic trick, even Lynette and Freminet knew not what was within. But as the room darkened and all eyes turned to Lyney, standing as he was in front of the box, even the highly-experienced magician showed some rare signs of trepidation.\n"Now, you might consider the following words an exaggeration, but the "present" I am about to present to you all is, without doubt, the most important one we have received in our lives."\nThe paper firecrackers burst, and the once-empty box suddenly opened by itself. The crowd cheered, amazed — then fell suddenly into stunned silence.\nWhat stood onstage was no present — nay, this was the Hotel's manager, its owner, and their "Father."\nHer image was one of unsmiling dignity, and thus, though she did not come by often, no one dared to horse around whenever she was around.\nSurely, Lyney had gone completely mad to have her make her appearance in such a frivolous way.\nYet, upon seeing the crowd's reaction, "Father" did not snap at anyone, opining merely that Lyney had kept this secret perfectly, just as a magic show should, declaring it worthy of praise.\nThat night, the children and their "Father" delighted in the various desserts together, and she personally sliced a serving of cake for each of them, which she herself enjoyed some of as well.\nPerhaps the most amazing aspect of Lyney's Founding Day magic show was its ability to have even "Father" lay down her heavy burden and enjoy a brief moment of familial love. ｜ 「布法蒂公馆」的创立日，所有的孩子都在忙前忙后，把屋子布置得充满节日色彩。\n对公馆成员而言，屋外的节日都显得冰冷无情，与他们的生活格格不入，只有这栋房屋能确确实实带来温暖。\n在林尼的策划下，众人都行动了起来，琳妮特采购了大量的节日装饰，和其他孩子拉起了彩带，挂上了手写的庆祝文字。\n菲米尼正在确认魔术道具是否能够正常运作，林尼很信任菲米尼的手艺，这次的机关设计更是全权交于他手。\n而林尼则是最繁忙的一个人，不仅要确认大家的准备情况，还要暗中为独创的盛大魔术做出最后的布置。\n在所有人的齐心努力之下，宴会顺利举办，在大厅的留声机播放的欢快歌声中，孩子们跳起舞蹈，享用美食，这一天虽不是任何人的生日，众人却认为这才是他们重获新生的一天。\n最后的压轴大戏，当然是林尼，琳妮特和菲米尼准备的创立日大魔术，房屋中央已经摆好了魔术箱，众人都在静静等待。\n为了留足魔术的惊喜，内容就连琳妮特和菲米尼都不知道，只见周围灯光暗下，视线聚焦于箱前的林尼，可能是惊喜太过隆重，就连见惯了风浪的他表情都有些紧张。\n「我接下来说的话可能太过夸张，但我将要送上的，是我们人生中最为重要的『礼物』。」\n纸礼炮砰砰作响，本应空无一物的魔术箱中竟然自动打开，众人欢呼，惊愕，却又呆滞，无言，一切静了下来。\n到场的并非什么礼物，而是公馆的负责人，持有者，更是众人口中的「父亲」。\n「父亲」的形象高大威严，不苟言笑，平日她不经常出现于此，但她在此地之时，绝无有人敢言行放肆。\n林尼或许是疯了，才会用如此轻浮的方式让「父亲」登场。\n然而看见众人的反应，「父亲」并未厉声呵斥，而是认为林尼完美地守住了秘密，达到了魔术的预期效果，值得夸奖。\n当夜，孩子们与「父亲」共享甜点，「父亲」为在场的每个孩子分切了蛋糕，她自己也享用了少许。\n或许，能让「父亲」放下沉重的责任，享受这片刻的家庭之爱，这才是林尼的创立日大魔术中最神奇的部分吧。
- Look for signs ｜ 寻找「征兆」
- Or perhaps we are already living in the apocalypse, and the good times have long ended. ｜ 或许我们已经生活在末日当中，所有美好的时代早已结束。

"It seems that none know what that purple being has been through, but its long, drawn-out cry seems to exude an air of... sorrow?"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Thunder Manifestation" is immune to Frozen, Stun, and Petrification, and starts with "Elemental Lifeform: Electro" attached to it. It will also deal +1 DMG to characters affected by "Lightning Rod."</color> ｜ 「喵…」「大家似乎都不知道那位紫色的生灵经历了什么，但好像能从它的长鸣里体会到一些…悲伤？」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「雷音权现」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化，初始附属「元素生命·雷」，并且对附属有「雷鸣探知」状态的角色造成的伤害+1。</color>

- An Ash Wood-and-rope guardrail with an exceedingly simple design. In Merusea Village, these barriers, which were meant to divide up territory, eventually became used to display items instead. Legend has it that this was because some Melusines believed that "good things should be shared," and came to hang things they thought were awesome up like banners for other Melusines to take as they pleased... ｜ 构造极为简洁的护栏，由「白梣木」的树枝和绳索搭建而成。在海沫村，本应用来划分领地的护栏变成了展示物品的工具。传说，这是因为部分美露莘们认为「好东西就要分享」，常常像悬挂旗帜一样，将自己认为很棒的东西挂在屋外展示，并任由其他美露莘随意取用…

- A feeling strikes you when you touch the wooden sword.\nWaves several meters high slam against the side of the ship.\nThe cracks caused by the impacts from the battle are aching.\nThere is noise all around you... everywhere.\nAn enemy jumps onto the deck, making the ship lurch.\n"Give up, Zaemon! Surrender now, and I'll spare your life!" ｜ 那是接触到木剑时突然感受到的…\n数丈高的海浪拍向船舷…\n因交战冲击而产生的裂伤隐隐作痛…\n四处是喧哗声，四处是喧哗声…\n敌将跃上甲板，连巨舟也为之一沉…\n「放弃吧，左卫门，现在求饶，还能留得你的性命！」

Defeat all opponents to complete the challenge. ｜ 在「千步拦射角分间」挑战中，旅行者需要使用特殊光学目镜，瞄准并射击敌人。\n<color=#ffcc33>按下「瞄准」按钮，即可进入瞄准状态</color>。瞄准敌人后，<color=#ffcc33>按下「射击」按钮便可向目镜瞄准之处发射子弹射击敌人</color>，击败情景中的所有敌人即可完成挑战。

- When he visited the city a few days back, he was going to have some cake with Klee, but the shops were all out and he didn't get any. ｜ 前几天他来城里玩的时候，本来要和可莉一起吃蛋糕，可是那天刚好蛋糕卖光了，他没吃到。

- I gave her some candies. ｜ 我给她送了点糖。
- She will do whatever it takes to smear my name... and that's when she was the irresponsible one who never contributed to the home! ｜ 那个女人根本就是在找各种角度污蔑我，分明她才是最不责任、 不顾家的那个！
- I need some time to consider how to let Nechca control the Blazegem Inscription on her own and extract the memories from her past. ｜ 怎么让妮赫佳独立控制「燃晶名刻」，抽取对应记忆这件事，我还需要思考一会。
- If we get a chance, we should ask Engineer about the voice lines the director mentioned. ｜ 如果有机会的话，还要问问「工程师」，刚刚说到的「处理语音」是怎么回事…
- Which should have been impossible, of course — I was quite certain that I was the only one in the room. ｜ 太匪夷所思了，我十分确定那个房间里当时应该只有我一个人，而且也不可能出现其他人。
- Hmm... The Fatui Harbingers are all such weirdos, so The Doctor being weird is actually normal. ｜ 唔…愚人众的执行官净是些奇怪的家伙，不如说「博士」的这种「奇怪」，是完全「不奇怪」的。

- I wish I could reach the level of a researcher, of course, but it's still a dream at the moment... ｜ 虽然我也希望自己能拥有学者的水平，不过这件事暂时还只是梦想…
- Whoa! That's a lot of Mora! ｜ 呜哇，好贵！

- In my opinion, our goals and dreams in life are all in pursuit of what we call "results." The so-called "journey" is but a path that leads to these results. ｜ 在我看来，人生的目标也好，理想也罢，都是一个个「结果」。而所谓的「旅途」，就是通往各种结果的一段路。
- We probably don't need to bring any offerings now that we've gotten to know her pretty well, right? Still, Paimon's got some snacks around here somewhere, so if she really wants something, we can just use that! ｜ 凭我们现在的关系，不用贡品也能见面了吧？我的零食袋还剩一点好吃的，如果她问起来的话，就把这个给她吧！

- Greetings! Thanks to you, our water and soil can grow delicious tea again! ｜ 哎呀，你们好啊。多亏了您，庄里的水土总算是又能育出好茶啦。

- I'm also feeling very nostalgic for his tea. ｜ 我也十分想念他的茶了。
- Never mind anything else... What would I do with several dozen bottles of perfume, anyway? I couldn't even give that many away fast enough! ｜ 你说别的东西也就算了，我买几十瓶香水要拿来做什么呢，就算送人也送不出这么多啊。

- "Today we tried sailing in a fixed direction, but the boat kept returning to its starting point. Reason unclear..."\n"Told you. We've been here long enough that we've already tried everything you could think of."\n"Huh, as if you islanders would even know where to start. We are the pirates of Inazuma, feared all across the ocean! Maybe you could learn a thing or two from our expertise."\n"The same expertise that got you stranded here?"\n"...Bah!" ｜ 「今天尝试了固定方向行驶，但无论如何，船都会回到出发点，原因不明…」\n「早说了，我们在这里这么多年，能试的方法全都试过。」\n「你们岛民本来就不是做这行的，我们才是名扬四海的稻妻海盗，航海问题，应该多参考我们的专家意见吧？」\n「搁浅在群岛的专家？」\n「…哼！」

- What a beautiful view. The ocean is good company... I hope we can all find some peace and happiness while we're here. ｜ 呼…景色真美啊。但愿每个人都能在大海的陪伴下寻得快乐与平静。
- I get it, though. You want to see something new, meet some new people, and so on. Chances like this are few and far between. ｜ 但我也能理解啦，想要开开眼界啦，想要结交些人啦之类的想法，毕竟这种机会可不常有。
- Since the ore can't be moved in time, it begins to accumulate, resulting in the alluring golden glow... ｜ 由于来不及流动，它们会大量地堆积在一起，散发出诱人的金色光芒…
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Amidst the Fleeing Smoke.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『于散逸的浮烟中』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Received with thanks. ｜ 那我就收下了。
- The power to grant wishes... but only within the confines of the bottle. ｜ 「能实现愿望，但即使能实现，也只限于瓶子里。」
- Uh, are you sure? Paimon doesn't see anything in there besides a few broken ruin mechanisms... ｜ 唔，真的吗？里面看上去除了坏掉的遗迹机关，也没有什么别的…
- Aw, it sounds so cute! ｜ 哇，听上去肯定很可爱！
- But he suddenly got wrapped up in a certain incident. ｜ 不过，那家伙不知道为什么，突然卷入了一个事件里。
- Don't be cheap. You'll need to spend to catch Dori's eye. If there's any Mora left over, just keep it. ｜ 不用吝惜金钱，要想打动多莉，这些开销是必须的。如果你们和她交易过后还剩下一点零钱，就自己拿着吧。
- If a friend will join you outside in the bitter cold to drink Fire-Water and chat together, you know they're the kind of person you want with you on the battlefield. ｜ 一边在冰天雪地里喝着「火水」一边聊天的两人，基本就已经要好到了能上战场的关系。
- Got it. I'll go prepare a whole feast of desserts! ｜ 那我要准备一大桌甜食——
