- Wanna spend some time in the mountains? We can try to dodge Fluff-Fleece Goats as they headbutt us. Or, we can pretend the Red-Beaked Pelicans are bandits and try to rescue Jade Heartfeather Bass from their beaks... Oh, you want to play Windtrace? You'll be the Hunter? Hehe, someone's confident. Alright, if you end up running in circles, I'll ring my silver bell to help you find me. If you manage to touch even the tip of my hair, I'll count that as your win! I'm pretty good at this game, too, you know. ｜ 要来山里面玩吗？可以和柔柔羊玩躲避头槌，或者让朱喙鹈鹕扮演大嘴巴强盗，在限定时间内从它嘴里解救可怜的玉玉心羽鲈…想玩风行迷踪？你当猎手？哼哼，很自信嘛。好吧，要是你急得打转，我会摇响银铃给你提示的，摸到我的发尖就算你赢，我也是很自信的哦。

- During the Highwind Trial, you may use the buffs provided by Sublime Anemograna to challenge powerful opponents. You can obtain 3 Sublime Anemograna at any one time, and the buffs you get from them will differ based on the number of Sublime Anemograna you have obtained.\nThese Anemograna will also provide different combat buffs in the three areas covered by the challenge. A buff that takes effect in one area will not take effect in the other areas. ｜ 在「高风的演试」中，旅行者可以借助「高妙风种子」提供的战斗增益挑战强大的敌人。「高妙风种子」最多可以同时获取三枚，获取的「高妙风种子」数量不同时，获得的战斗增益效果也不同。\n挑战涉及的三个区域中，「高妙风种子」将提供不同的战斗增益。当前区域的「高妙风种子」战斗增益无法在其他区域生效。

- In life, youkai possess supernatural powers, and even when they are a shadow of their former selves from a bygone era, they still have the ability to control whether they are visible or not. ｜ 妖怪们活着的时候有法力，即使只是一些来自旧日的幻影，也能够控制自己显形与否。
- Though it feels like we caused... a mess, but not an overly large one, at least Paimon's curiosity has been completely satisfied! ｜ 虽然感觉，我们好像闯了一个…不大不小的祸？但满足了我一直以来的好奇心，心满意足！
- Tea tasting comes later, and tea preparation comes first. If we do plan to go into it, then we must discuss tea preparation first. And the specifics of it depend on the type of tea. ｜ 品茶在后，沏茶在前，真要谈讲究，还须先聊沏茶，具体的讲究更应视茶种而定。
- H—He hid himself in the statue! What should we do? ｜ 它、它藏到雕像里去了，有什么办法吗？
- It's not just Aaru Village. Other passing merchants have also been affected. That's why the Akademiya sent Vinayak and me to deal with these unruly Wenut. ｜ 不止是阿如村，还有一些过往行商也受到了影响。所以，教令院派了我和维纳亚克来处理这些作乱的沙虫。

- *sigh* That Officer Menthe... ｜ 唉，梅莘警官啊…

- More swordsmanship practice, Xingqiu? ｜ 行秋，你又在练剑了？
- Contention is the principle by which all is weighed in the Nation of Pyro.\nThough humans cannot fly at the speed of winged beasts, nor match the flexibility of slimes, yet still, they have their own unique strengths. Sometimes, understanding both why and how to compete is the key to knowing oneself. ｜ 火之国土的原则是角逐。\n人无法与有翼的兽比较飞行的速度，无法与史莱姆比较身躯的柔软，但人自有卓然之处。有时，为何要进行角逐，如何进行角逐，正是认清自己的关键。
- 6-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Ah, you're here. Master Kulahaw has already left your processed gem in the shop, leaving instructions that I personally deliver it to you. ｜ 你们来啦，库拉霍师傅已经把加工好的宝石留在铺子里了，嘱咐我说要亲手交给你们。
- If I were to make a comparison... It would be like setting up a big pot in front of someone's house and stewing fish-and-radish paste that has been fermented for five years! Why, any sensible neighbor would have rushed out of doors to beat me senseless! ｜ 类比一下，简直就像…在别人家门口架起大锅，炖煮发酵五年后的鱼肉和白萝卜泥一样，会让邻居冲出来把我狠狠打一顿！
- Late one night when the weather was mild, he sat by a campfire with the Fatui, quietly listening to what they had to say.\nHe was the only one who stayed quiet, aside from The Captain, who joined them later. The soldiers themselves did not hold back — it was clear they were already aware that he was working with their commander. The things they talked about were of no particular importance, yet they spoke and laughed freely, showing no restraint on account of his presence. After asking his age, one soldier even handed him a cup of a colorless drink they called "Fire-Water."\nAfter a cautious sip, he proceeded to down it in one gulp, just as he had seen the soldiers do, receiving a loud cheer in response. For some reason, he felt a lot better after doing this.\nThe soldiers around him chatted about trivial matters, every now and then breaking into songs they all knew. Ororon did not have much to add, so he simply sat there, either watching the fire before them or the sky high above. It felt so far from the ground, the individual stars like tiny white kernels, together like mist. "Astral Mist," he suddenly thought to himself. Not a bad name...\nLater, he would learn that not all Fatui soldiers were like this. The ones he met were elite soldiers led by the First Harbinger, older veterans with experience and firm moral standards. Beyond this company, however, there were many others who were younger than he was, others whose actions would leave his brows well and truly furrowed.\nBut on that windless night, with the stars so clearly visible in the sky, he had not yet been troubled by such knowledge. He simply let go of his worries, enjoying the friendly company and the cup of strange-tasting liquor he had been given.\nThere would never be another night like this. He sensed it then — just like how, when he considered accepting a second drink, he was firmly stopped by The Captain. Though he seemed completely normal after the first cup and potentially could really hold his liquor, yet all the same, some places are best not delved into too deeply.\nBut clearly, Ororon was not exactly the obedient type. Later, he discreetly tracked down the soldier who had handed him that drink and asked him how to brew Fire-Water himself. If he ever managed to make a batch clear enough to reflect the night sky, he'd name the first bottle "Astral Mist." ｜ 某个气温和善的深夜，他和愚人众坐在营地里，安静地听他们讲话。\n安静的其实只有他自己，还有后来加入的「队长」。士兵们并不避讳，显然已经知道了他和他们长官的合作；虽然只是聊些无关紧要的闲话，但该说说该笑笑，完全没有因为他的存在而拘谨。甚至在询问了他的年龄后，有人递给他一杯叫「火水」的无色饮料。\n他试探性地尝了一点，然后一饮而尽——因为那些士兵都是这么做的——然后收获了一阵响亮的欢呼声。不知为何，他感觉心情好了不少。\n士兵们在他身边聊着一些家长里短，偶尔还会唱起他们都会唱的歌来。欧洛伦插不上话，就只是坐着，看看篝火，或者看看天上。天空离地面是那么的远，细小的星星看上去就是白色的颗粒。雾也是由颗粒组成的…「星雾」，感觉是个好名字，欧洛伦没来由地想。\n后来他才知道，愚人众里并不都是这样的队伍。他接触到的是第一席执行官带领的精锐部队，都是有些年纪和经验的「老兵」了，并且行为和道德标准良好。而在这支部队之外，其实有很多比他年纪还要小的人，做着一些他听了会眉头紧皱的事情。\n但在那个无风的、能看得清星星的夜里，他还没有受到这些知识的侵扰。他只是短暂地忘却了一些烦恼，放任自己享受着友好的陪伴，和一杯味道怪异的酒。\n这样的夜不会再有了。他当时就有此预感，就像他想再喝一杯的时候，被「队长」执意拦下。即使喝过一杯的他看起来并无异样，有酒量很好的潜质，但有些东西不应该再深入了。\n不过欧洛伦显然不是那么听话的人。他后来偷偷找到那位给他递酒的士兵，打听到了自酿火水的办法。如果自己之后成功酿出清澈到可以倒映夜空的酒，就给第一瓶起名叫「星雾」。
- 'Tis all thanks to you, Ms. Paimon. ｜ 派蒙女士，我是托您的福。

- Granny told me many stories when I was a little kitten. About the youkai of Inazuma, the festivals held in the city, the delicacies of other nations... I would curl up on her lap and listen until I fell asleep. Even now, I still can't tell which parts of the stories were real, and which were a part of my dreams... ｜ 在我还是一只小猫的时候，奶奶和我讲过很多很多故事。什么稻妻的妖怪啦、城里的庆典啦、其他国家的美食啦什么的…我就这么在奶奶腿上趴着，听着听着就睡着了。到现在，我都不知道哪些是真的故事，哪些是我的梦。
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nVennessa was not truly bound by her chains. If she had so wished, no ordinary physical constraints forged in Mondstadt could have held her, for the land there yielded no ore of exceptional quality, nor did it possess the divine flame of her ancestral home.\nShe was only bound by her responsibility to take care of her tribespeople. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n温妮莎并不是被镣铐或者锁链困住的，她想要挣脱枷锁和镣铐的话，随时都能击碎蒙德融造的普通金属。毕竟这里既没有优秀的矿石，也没有故乡的神火。\n锁住她的，是守护族人的责任。

- An exquisite strip table cabinet made from Peach Palm Wood and lined with an elegantly patterned tablecloth. Can be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. It is said that the Stadium's unique interior has caused these tables to serve as filler for empty spaces or as a complement to some other aesthetic, rather than as the main furniture item. However, it has borne these tasks dutifully, just as those who go unnamed and unsung in Natlan itself... ｜ 采用了「桃椰子木」板材的精致条状桌柜，桌面上铺有花纹雅致的桌布，能在圣火竞技场内见到。据说，由于圣火竞技场室内结构的特殊性，这种条状的桌柜往往被用来填补空间的空缺，或作为审美上的补充，而不是作为主要的家具出现。但它依然兢兢业业的承担着自己的职责，就像纳塔无数的「默默无名者」一样…

- A curious portable stove that can be quickly set up for cooking almost anywhere. Liyue's terrain is vast, varied, and at times even inhospitable — and yet all its inhabitants share a love of good food. These two phenomena would not be able to coexist were it not for portable cooking equipment like this. Whether you are scaling the heights of Jueyun Karst or exploring the islets of Guyun Stone Forest, bringing a portable stove means that a delicious and freshly cooked hot meal is always available at a moment's notice. ｜ 能在几乎任何地方快速架设烹饪的神奇锅炉。璃月的土地广袤、地形错综复杂；璃月人爱好美食。能同时体现这些特点的，恐怕就是这种便携烹饪用锅。利用这种装置，即使身处绝云间的高峰，或是在孤云阁的礁岛上，都能随时做出新鲜的菜肴。
- Those who kept working all disappeared. The one who left early emerged safe and sound. It would appear that the incident occurred on-site. ｜ 留在工作区的人纷纷失踪，躲在休息区的人却安然无恙。可见，事情是发生在工作区。
- But I'm not good at speeches... and can you really call me the "leader"...? ｜ 我不擅长这种事情…而且，说我是「团长」也实在…

- About the Special Patrol and the simulation... ｜ 关于特巡队和推演…
- She's still very weak. The shock and the cold wind certainly didn't help, so she ended up with a slight fever. I gave her some medicine, and now she's in bed. ｜ 那孩子身体还是太虚弱了，先是受了惊，又吹了凉风，现在有些低烧。刚吃过药后，就回去睡着了。

- Okay, so he's useless now. What do we do? ｜ 他已经不行了…怎么办？
- A vortex created by a unique turbulence. Anything that falls within will be hurled up high by the wild currents.\nKoholasaurs and the People of the Springs can use Jet-Set Eddies to make the ultimate super high leap! ｜ 由于特殊的紊流而产生的漩涡，落入其中的东西会被水流弹飞到高处。\n鳍游龙与「流泉之众」的部族成员可以借由「射流漩涡」，进行具有超高高度的极限跳跃！
- This story sounds familiar... Hey, don't you mean "Azhdaha"? ｜ 总觉得在哪里听过这个故事…喂，你想说的是「若陀」才对吧！
- But why would he do something like that... ｜ 可这样做的目的又是什么呢…
- Yeah, we've known each other for a really long time! ｜ 对啊对啊，我们认识好久啦！
- Rex Lapis, dead... Impossible... ｜ 岩王爷死了…怎么可能…
- You hear from the Adventurers' Guild that there might be an opportunity to borrow Layla's urgently-needed equipment. ｜ 从冒险家协会得知，现在或许还有借到莱依拉急需仪器的办法。
- (I've gotten pretty used to this quiet way of life.) ｜ （差不多习惯这种平静的生活了。）
- This mystical crystal construct seems to have originally been designed to test the dampness of its surroundings, but it seems that it can only detect its own dampness and react accordingly.\nIn situations where it is <color=#FFE14BFF>continually affected by Hydro</color>, maybe something nice and unexpected might occur? ｜ 这种奇特的结晶体原本设计的目的似乎是感应周围潮湿的程度，但最终只能感应自身潮湿的程度并作出反应。\n在向其<color=#FFE14BFF>持续施加水元素</color>的情况下，可能会有意想不到的好事发生？
- Feast of Boundless Joy ｜ 无边酣乐之筵
- Creates Frost Barriers, and deals Cryo DMG to any Lil' Fungus hit. While Frost Barriers remain on the field, they will block the movement and certain attacks of the Lil' Fungi. ｜ 生成屏护冰墙，并对冰墙命中的「小小灵蕈」造成冰元素伤害。屏护冰墙存在期间，将阻挡「小小灵蕈」的行进与部分攻击。
- You can say that again! Imagine if he'd tried to approach Citlali directly. She'd have seen through it right away! ｜ 是哦，如果那家伙直接找到茜特菈莉，应该一分钟就会被识破！
- She also understands that in revealing the truth through your exclusive news, you have offended some interested parties that have been pulling strings behind the scenes — and that is why you have been sent on an international reporting trip to cover the Genius Invokation TCG events. ｜ 包括您因「独家新闻」揭露的真相触及到了某些利益阶层，而被远派他国报道「七圣召唤」一事，凝光大人也尽数知晓。
- Please do not enter without permission. ｜ 请勿随意入内。

- That jade pendant made from Smaragdus Jadeite cost me lots of Mora! And he even kept contact with those sneaky Treasure Hoarders after supposedly washing his hands off the business! ｜ 当初买那个「翠珏岩」做的玉佩，可花了我好多摩拉呢！而且这老臭在金盆洗手之后，还行那些跟盗宝团沾边的偷鸡摸狗之事！
- Gorou is the great general of Watatsumi Island's military, and he is deeply loved by his subordinates.\nDuring the period of the Vision Hunt Decree, Gorou led the forces of Watatsumi against the Shogun's Army, and successfully held the line against them.\nThe troops call him the "ever-victorious pointy-eared general," a nickname that has also seen broad use among Shogunate warriors.\nIn private, however, Gorou puts on no airs and is a straightforward person, which has led him to be regarded by all as the man with the plan.\nBut even such an exemplary general must have his fair share of troubles... ｜ 五郎是海祇岛军的大将，在军队中威望极高，深受部下们爱戴。\n眼狩令期间，五郎多次带领海祇岛军与幕府军作战，即使条件艰难，也成功守住了防线。\n将士们称他为「常胜的尖耳将军」，这一称号在幕府方面也广为流传。\n私下里，五郎却没什么架子，待人真挚直率，是士兵们公认的知心大哥。\n不过，即使是这样一位优秀的将领，似乎也有着一些自己的烦恼…
- It was indeed a very novel experience. Perhaps I was attracted by her purity, because that's a quality I will never possess. ｜ 的确是很新奇的体验。也许是被她的纯粹所吸引了吧，因为那恰恰是我不可能具有的品质。
- *sigh* You... ｜ 我说你啊…
- Switch Area ｜ 切换区域
- Phew... I hope that cleared things up for you? Hey, is this that new Brainsercise game that's been super popular with the scholars lately? It's surprisingly fun. ｜ 呼…这回应该没什么疑问了吧？欸，这是不是最近学者之间流行的叫做「头脑急转弯」的游戏？想不到还挺有趣的。
- An instrument with an eternal flow that continues mercilessly within, reminding the Berserker of the limited time he has left — both on the battlefield as well as in the world. ｜ 永远无情流动着的器物。提醒着狂战士自己在战场上的时限，和在人世间的时限。
- Hey, you can't hear a taste! And what are you doing here, Charlotte? ｜ 味道是用尝的，不是听的！你怎么突然出现啦，夏洛蒂？
- Thank you. No harm done. ｜ 嗯，现在倒是没事了。
- Tch, old woman! Don't show such disrespect to our heirloom blade! ｜ 去、去！老太婆，不许对家传宝刀不敬！
- Hah... I never expected to live this long in the first place. My death is already long overdue... So why should I fear it? ｜ 哈…好些年前我就该上路了，现在还有什么可怕的？
- W—we'd known each other f—for such a long t—time, too. What a shame... ｜ 我、我们认识了很长时间，真、真是可惜…
- What happened? ｜ 发生什么了？
- Still... I ran off in a huff without giving any thought to whether they would act... I'm sorry. That was my mistake. ｜ 只是…当时我只顾着生你的气，没能多在途中为你注意那些家伙的不妙之处…非常对不起，这是我的失职…
- Wow... ｜ 哇…
- You fail to penetrate the storm. ｜ 未能成功穿越雷暴…

- Prized Isshin Blade ｜ 「一心传」名刀
- Huh? So after that, you slowly drifted away from the other Pari and learned your strange way of speaking from the Order of Skeptics? ｜ 欸？所以之后斯露莎就渐渐疏远花灵同族，还跟矫论团的人学会了那些怪话吗？
- I know, I know. I'll listen to her, and I definitely won't run off! ｜ 我知道啦。我很听话的，绝对不乱跑。
- Oh! Paimon sees the cart, but what are these hilichurls doing here!? Do they want some fresh fruit now, too? ｜ 哦！看见货车了，怎么还有丘丘人！哇，难道它们是被水果的香味吸引来的？
- Anqa ｜ 安迦
- I've heard from the fellow knights that you can find them on the bodies of hilichurls. It's not like I've had the chance to test that theory out in battle though... ｜ 我听骑士团的同事说，可以在丘丘人的身上找到。但也只是听说啦，哈哈，我也没有实战的机会…
- No... I didn't put a sticker on your back. ｜ 没有哦，我没有在你背后贴贴纸。
- Show yourself! I knew there was someone inside! Hmph... How ironic that Erge, who couldn't even find a helm, says my intel is wrong. ｜ 出来！我知道里面有人！哼…那个二哥连个头盔都找不到…还说我情报有误？
- I give you my apologies, uh... strange yet... respectable travelers. ｜ 我向你们致歉，呃…陌生而可敬的旅人。
- "Reach out, those who would follow in my footsteps..." ｜ 「后来者，来到此处的人啊，伸出手…」
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- There's not a single song I do not know, no matter if it's from the past, present, or future. ｜ 过去、未来与现在，没有我不知道的歌谣。
- A sigil passed down through Watatsumi Island and Enkanomiya. Each of the five Key Sigils is unique in its structure. ｜ 海祇岛与渊下宫流传的键纹。五种键纹样式各不相同。
- Use the ability of the Xenochromatic Ball Octopus. ｜ 使用异色球球章鱼的能力。
- Perfect timing. Can you escort them to safety? ｜ 来得正好，能送他们吗？
- A shot taken from a medium position and distance. It can capture the character and their surroundings. However, the available scale and detail are also somewhat middling... ｜ 距离适中的机位，基本能拍摄到角色和物件的全部轮廓，不过画幅和细节都处于适中水平…
- Munen Shockwave DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 梦念冲击波伤害|{param2:F1P}
- The fragment? ｜ 碎块？
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Black-Back Perch Stew. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「水煮黑背鲈」的制作方法。
- If you think you can do better, why don't you give it another try? You should never stop trying while you're young. Losing isn't a big deal anyway. ｜ 不服气的话，再来尝试咯？年轻就多尝试嘛，输了也没什么大不了的。
- Perhaps the immense power we released was the pouring out of all these irreplaceable emotions that had built up over time. ｜ 就是因为这些无可替代的情感积累，才能逆转为巨大的力量吧。
- If you ask me, you're clearly a sharp person, Ferdinand. ｜ 依我所见，费迪南德先生明明就是个聪明人嘛。
- Only this creature with a name most humble, as though it was seeking to actively conceal its unique talents, this "Dopey," has dared to respond to my tests, and has proven relatively cooperative. Praiseworthy indeed! ｜ 唯独本名质朴，像是在主动隐藏自身独特之处的「阿呆」，大胆地回应了本皇女的试探，表现得相当配合，值得本皇女的一声称赞！
- Place Dandelion Seeds in. ｜ 撒入蒲公英籽。
- I think a relaxed pose is best. ｜ 还是放松的姿势比较好。
- Uh, why? ｜ 为什么？
- They are responsible for implementing the policy that comes down from Rex Lapis and making rulings on important matters. They are akin to the hands and feet of Rex Lapis. ｜ 他们会负责贯彻岩王帝君的方针，决议要事，如同岩王帝君的手足一般。
- Does this happen every time Huangshan does escort duty? This is real tough. ｜ 黄衫平时走镖总是遇到这样的情况吗？还真是不容易呀。
- Konda Village is simple and peaceful. There are no secrets here. ｜ 绀田村民风淳朴，生活太平。哪有什么秘密。
- Alright. You're free to go. ｜ 作为守卫，我放过你们了。
- I'm sure she'll be willing to help us. With a member of the Gardes present, I doubt they'll try anything too extreme. ｜ 我相信，她会愿意帮助我们的。有一位警官在旁边，那群人应该也不敢做出什么过激的举动。
- Anyway, if you're in need of ore, you can go mine some here. ｜ 你需要矿石的话，可以去这里开采一些。
- Lord Nagarjuna is a hero who fought against the "De{RUBY#[S]monster}v" alongside the divine bird's heirs. He gained divine power through the "Rite of Chinvat" and put an end to the calamity. ｜ 那伽朱那大人可是曾与神鸟的后嗣一同对抗「迪{RUBY#[D]魔物}弗」，通过「离渡之仪」获得了神力，最终镇服了灾厄的英雄。
- ...This isn't sufficient. ｜ …还不够。
- But the Doushin from the Tenryou Commission still confiscated my toys without a second thought... The way I see it, those toys could still be sold as lovely-looking bombs! ｜ 可是那些天领奉行的同心还是二话不说，就把我所有的玩具都扣留了…明明还可以作为「外形可爱的炸弹」出售的！
- Spotless Waters ｜ 无染的澈水
- Children ｜ 孩子们
- "War is a river of bitter tears no ship can hope to ford, and its waves rage ever hither and tither in a swirl of utter discord." ｜ 「战争是苦泪之川，无舟可渡，纵横奔流。」
- I guess it's supposed to be a test left there by our ancestors. If you don't pass the test, you're not worthy of viewing their works of art. ｜ 那道禁制或许就是先祖的考验吧，无法通过考验，也就没资格欣赏他们的作品。
- Well, maybe my analogy wasn't the best, but I think you'll figure it out just fine once you're there! ｜ 哈哈，我打的比方可能有点不太贴切，不过你到了报告地点，自然就会知道了。
- Neuvillette ｜ 那维莱特
- Search for the missing part ｜ 寻找缺失部件

- I mean, it's quick and easy, if troublesome for anyone else. ｜ 毕竟这样确实既方便又快捷，就是别人看的时候确实会有些麻烦…

- Much like all handicrafts, rattan weaving is a skill that relies more on the body than the mind.\nOnce a frame has been crafted and the overall shape of an object set, Lan Yan must use the utmost care to weave each warp and every weft. After years of practice, the skills and movements of her craft have not only been burned into her brain but become second nature and muscle memory.\nOn a deeper level, this process has also gradually refined and clarified her spirit.\nLan Yan is a master rattan weaver. She has never been given over to grandiose dreams of chasing the moon and the stars, nor of forsaking all that she has and living her life as a hermit on some distant mountain.\nHer life is a simple one, natural and unadorned.\nAs she weaves, her hands honor the memories of days past, retracing their steps to expertly craft delicate patterns and shapes.\nAll the while, her heart does not lie idle, for she is thinking of the mountain mists, the vines that climb the cliffs and crags, and the sensation of freshly fallen leaves beneath her bare and carefree feet.\nShe thinks of Chenyu Vale — of her family amidst the mountains and rivers — and the rattan in her hands becomes supple and pliable to her will.\nShe dreams of weaving these beautiful things with her own two hands so that her memories can live forever in the objects she creates. Perhaps because her heart is filled with warmth and kindness, the objects that Lan Yan crafts exude a simple, gentle spirit.\nPerhaps that's also why the cats, dogs, birds, and squirrels of Chenyu Vale are never scared to approach her.\n"Even the adepti come to watch Lan Yan weave." Her grandfather had once proudly claimed.\nNo one could know for sure if the adepti had ever truly stopped in passing to watch Lan Yan perform her craft. Lan Yan herself believes that beings who would pour their power into protecting the waters and mountains of the vale, and all those who dwelt there, would surely have an appreciation for handicrafts so lovingly created and imbued with the spirit of their creator.\nSo when she discovered a Vision glinting softly at the bottom of her rattan basket, she was not surprised. She simply picked it up and continued on her way, gathering rattan vines. ｜ 就像所有的手工艺活计一样，编藤是一项依赖肢体多过依赖大脑的工作。\n每次定好型之后，蓝砚要做的就是静心，用双手认真编好每一条经纬。经过长期练习，编织的技巧与技艺不仅储存在她的头脑里，更内化成为了她双手的「记忆」。\n她的心灵也在这个过程中逐渐变得澄澈、洗练。\n蓝砚是一位藤编师，她未曾有过追逐日月一般宏大的理想，当然也不是武侠小说中里幽居的天纵奇才。\n她的生活简简单单，淳朴自然。\n编藤的时候，她的双手会循着过去每一天的记忆，熟练地织出细密的花纹和形状。\n与此同时，她的心并没有沉眠，她想着山间的雾，石崖边攀援而下的藤，光着脚踩起来绵绵软软的落叶。\n想着沉玉谷，想着她山水中的家，手下的藤也变得柔软起来。\n她希望能把这些美好的东西都用自己的双手编织出来，希望这些回忆能永远停留于自己的作品之中，或许是因为心中饱含温柔和善意，蓝砚编出的器皿总是透着一股拙朴温厚的味道。\n而在这种时候，猫儿、狗儿，还有山谷中的鸟雀、松鼠也都格外愿意亲近她。\n「就算是天上的神仙，肯定也愿意看我们蓝砚编藤哩。」爷爷曾经这样自豪地称赞她。\n没人知道是否曾经真的有神仙驻足观看蓝砚编藤，但蓝砚自己相信，既然神仙们愿意倾注自己的神力，庇护这一方清秀山水，令人安居乐业，肯定也会赞赏人类用心织出的作品，赞赏作品中的珍惜之意。\n所以当她看到自己随身携带的藤包中出现了一枚莹亮的神之眼时，一点也不惊讶，倒是拿起它，开开心心地采藤去了。

- All Brilliant Blessings are enhanced:\nFor Vaporize Blessings, the Pyro and Hydro RES decrease caused to opponents by the Vaporize reaction is increased by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color>.\nFor Burning Blessings, Burning reaction DMG is increased by <color=#f39001>{1}%</color>.\nFor Bloom Blessings, DMG dealt by Dendro Cores (including Burgeon and Hyperbloom DMG) is increased by <color=#f39001>{2}%</color> ｜ 所有辉彩祝福的效果获得强化：\n对于蒸发祝福，蒸发反应使敌人的火元素与水元素抗性降低的效果提升<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>；\n对于燃烧祝福，燃烧反应造成的伤害提升<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>；\n对于绽放祝福，且草原核造成的伤害（包含烈绽放、超绽放）提升<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>

Periodically squeezes a Hydro Slime to <color=#FF8126FF>unleash large quantities of Hydro bubbles</color>, dealing Hydro DMG and immobilizing weaker enemies.\nNormally uses a scythe to perform spinning attacks, dealing <color=#FF8126FF>AoE Hydro DMG</color>. ｜ 顶尖近战单位。每隔一段时间，会挤压水史莱姆<color=#FF8126FF>释放大量水泡</color>，造成水元素伤害并禁锢较弱的敌人。\n平时会使用镰刀进行回旋攻击，造成水元素<color=#FF8126FF>范围伤害</color>。

When used, it sets a Teleport Waypoint at your current location. You can use this Pocket Waypoint through the map in the same manner as a normal Teleport Waypoint. ｜ 口袋锚点是拟似传送锚点的人造道具，一定程度上能与地脉相连，实现传送的功能。使用时，会将传送锚点部署在当前位置。通过地图，能像使用传送锚点那样，传送到口袋锚点所在。

- My father passed away at an early age. Even though I had a good number of friends during my years at the Akademiya, for some time, I still sensed many critical looks in my direction. ｜ 我老爹过世比较早，即使我在学校里人缘还不错，有段时间也能感受到其他人打量的眼光。
- Anyway, what brings you two here? Did you suddenly develop a passion for scholarship and finally decide to dedicate yourselves to the pursuit of truth? ｜ 不过话说回来，你们怎么在这里？难道是迸发出了对于学术的热情，终于下定决心要投身探寻真理的道路了吗？
- A mighty feat indeed, O hero. The corroded power is now returned to the realm of Night, and I can hear the Nightsouls rejoice. ｜ 真是了不起啊，勇士，被侵蚀的力量也回归了夜神的国度，我能感受到夜魂们的欢悦。
- Thankfully, I'm quite the workaholic, so even if a lot of people go on break at once, it's all the same to me, haha. ｜ 幸好我是个「工作狂」，就算有段时间休息的人很多也没有问题，哈哈。

- "Those who forged our own destiny and future." ｜ 「我们铸造了命运与未来。」

- Cyno and I have had a great time. We ate a lot of delicious food and bought quite a few gifts. ｜ 我和赛诺都玩得很开心，尝了不少好吃的，还买了不少礼物。
- I'm sure we don't have to worry about her work. I just hope everything goes well after that. ｜ 她工作方面的事情肯定用不着我们担心，只希望之后的进展也能顺利。

- But after meeting Bongo-Head, we realized that if you just give them some time and treat them well, the gentler Fungi will get to know you and treat you like their friends! ｜ 但遇见了「咚咚小圆帽」后，我们发现，只要不断努力，以真情实感对待温和的蕈兽，它们也会作出回应，和我们友善地交流！

- We won't lose. ｜ 我们不会输的。

- Lyudochka takes a moment to calm down.\nAfterward, you return the Mora she sent back to her. ｜ 片刻后，柳达希卡终于平静了下来。\n然后，将她留下的钱还给了她。
- No... No, I cannot scry further, for even a Prinzessin who bears the Auge der Verurteilung is certain to become lost in your boundless, immaculate phantasmal night! ｜ 不…不能再窥探了！否则即使是拥有断罪之眼的本皇女，也一定会迷失在你那无垠无瑕的幻夜！
- There's no need to be so pessimistic either. Though that is an odd thing to say to a machine. ｜ 你也一样不必太过悲观。虽然对着机器说这话非常奇怪就是了。
- A small flower-shaped insignia. If you listen carefully, you can almost hear a flute playing and voices singing. ｜ 小小的花形徽章。侧耳细听的话，仿佛能听到悠扬的笛声和清新的歌唱声。
- After hearing the information Jiwani provided and combining it with the notes left by Alhaitham, you feel like there's something suspicious about the Diadem of Knowledge being used as a prize... You should inform a member of staff as soon as possible. ｜ 听了西瓦尼提供的情报，再结合艾尔海森的留下的笔记，总觉得作为奖品的才识之冠似乎有些问题。尽快联系工作人员吧。

- Varesa restores 30 Energy when she enters Apex Drive.\nHer Plunging Attacks and Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Guardian Vent!</color> gain 10% CRIT Rate and 100% CRIT DMG.\nAdditionally, when Varesa uses the Hold version of her Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Riding the Night-Rainbow</color>, or Taps her Elemental Skill while in the Sudden Onrush mode, she will restore Nightsoul points up to her maximum. ｜ 进入极限驱动状态时，将为瓦雷莎恢复30点元素能量。\n瓦雷莎的下落攻击与元素爆发<color=#FFD780FF>闪烈降临！</color>的暴击率提升10%，暴击伤害提升100%。\n此外，瓦雷莎长按施放元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>夜虹逐跃</color>时，或是在「突驰烈进」模式下点按施放元素战技时，瓦雷莎将恢复夜魂值至上限。

- Dodoco loves me, an—and I love Dodoco, so Dodo-King can never separate us. That's why Dodo-King doesn't want to see us... ｜ 因为嘟嘟可喜欢可莉，可莉也喜欢嘟嘟可，大魔王没法把我们分开，就只能不见我们…

It lives around the rivers, lakes, and wetlands of Teyvat.\nThis wild duck with brilliant green feathers adorning its head and neck is especially sensitive to changes in the wind. - Use Kinich's Elemental Skill to <color=#FFCC33FF>collect and shoot Mimetic Pectin to break bricks</color> and go to the <color=#FFCC33FF>other side of the wall</color> to collect Adventure Coins and score points.\nDuring the challenge, all party members will have reduced CDs and maintain a state in which their Phlogiston stays full and will not be consumed. ｜ 利用基尼奇的元素战技，<color=#FFCC33FF>收取、发射拟态果胶击碎墙砖</color>，并前往<color=#FFCC33FF>墙面的另一侧</color>拾取冒险币获取积分。\n挑战中，队伍中所有角色获得冷却缩减，且保持燃素充沛不会消耗的状态。
- What were you writing? ｜ 这上面写了什么？
- According to what information we did manage to get, this was a gathering place for pirates several centuries ago. Then, the Shogunate cleared all the pirates out and moved the inhabitants to other places... ｜ 根据协会给的资料，几百年前，这里似乎曾经是一处「海贼」的聚集点，当时，是由幕府出面扫清了所有海贼，并且把岛上的居民都迁移到了别处…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。

- Some fate must have dictated that we would meet here. But that friend of yours... *sigh* ｜ 能在这种地方相遇也是一种缘分。不过，你的那位朋友…唉…

- To be perfectly honest with you, this is by far the best choice for them that I know of... but I wouldn't want you to feel pressured to take them in, or to persuade you using honeyed words. ｜ 坦白说，这里是我能想到的最佳选择。但我不想因此而给你压力，或是用一些花言巧语的手段达成目的…
- The horn of a whale that you obtained from defeating Childe, who had unleashed the might of his Delusion.\nIt is said that the shape of one's constellation determines one's character. The image of a whale cruising across the celestial heights represents a solipsism that seeks to crush and devour all in its path.\nEmbracing this aspect of himself, Childe gleefully summoned one such beast before throwing himself into battle against you. ｜ 战胜解放了邪眼之力的「公子」后，取来的水鲸之角。\n传说中，命之座的图形反映着人的气质。而巡弋漆黑夜空的星辰之鲸，恐怕映照出的是粉碎一切、吞噬一切的狂傲理念吧…\n而接受了这一面的他，欣然唤出灭世的水之鲸，投身与你的战斗。

- A beast that resides in the woods. The king of the jungle.\nIt regards the entire woodland realm as its territory, and will often survey its domain even as a true king might. Any intruder shall be set upon with extreme prejudice.\nIt has almost exaggerated amount of fluff on its temple, and research indicates that this allows it to measure distances.\nIt is said that the forests once played host to a true "tiger," a divine beast that defended the woods. Upon its death, these creatures that resemble cats far more became the successors to its mighty name. ｜ 栖息在山林之间的猛兽，是森林中的王者。\n将丛林视为自己的领地，平时会像国王一样巡视自己的疆域。如果遇到入侵者，它们会毫不留情的发起进攻。\n鬓角上长着夸张的绒毛，根据学者的研究，似乎有着测量距离的功能。\n传说在丛林中曾经有一匹真正的「虎」，是保卫丛林的灵兽。在它死后，这种形态与猫更加接近的猛兽继承了「虎」的威名。

- The preservation of fresh water is of utmost importance for countryside life. The villagers in Konda Village have been using such a water tank for more than 100 years. It is made of heavy clay, which is hard and strong, and a tank liner made of fused cast stone, which is said to have a certain self-cleaning effect on the fresh water stored in it. ｜ 淡水的保存对于乡野生活而言可谓重中之重。绀田村民使用这种水缸已有百余年的历史。它的缸体是厚重的陶土，坚硬牢固，缸内则有熔铸石料制成的内胆，据说对储存其中的淡水，有一定的自洁作用。

- A monster of the Abyss Order who sings of the warmth of the dark flames.\nSome of its attacks will apply the brand of the abyssal flame when they deal DMG to characters. These brands will explode after a short while, causing the whole party to <color=#FFE14BFF>lose large amounts of HP</color>. You may be able to use Shields to prevent the brand from being applied. Your active character can succumb to HP loss resulting from the brands' explosions.\nWhen the Abyss Lector: Fathomless Flames enters a state where it is defended by a shield of abyssal fire, <color=#FFE14BFF>destroy its Darkfire Furnace to deplete its shield more easily</color>. ｜ 「深渊教团」的魔物，低声吟颂着漆黑烈焰的温暖。\n它的一些攻击对角色造成伤害时，会赋予深渊之火的烙印，在短时间后爆发，使队伍中所有角色<color=#FFE14BFF>损失大量生命值</color>。利用护盾，或许可以预防烙印的附着。处于场上的角色可能因为烙印爆发损失的生命值而倒下。\n深渊咏者·渊火进入渊火加护的状态后，可以通过<color=#FFE14BFF>破坏黯火炉心，更加快速地破除渊火加护</color>。

- After characters use <color=#ffcc33>Elemental Skills {0} time(s)</color>, the DMG dealt by the active character's <color=#ffcc33>Normal Attacks and Elemental Skill</color> will increase by <color=#ffcc33>{1}%</color>. If the character is in <color=#ffcc33>Nightsoul's Blessing</color>, the DMG dealt by the character's <color=#ffcc33>Normal Attack and Elemental Skill</color> increase by an additional <color=#ffcc33>{2}%</color>. ｜ 角色施放<color=#ffcc33>{0}次元素战技</color>后，当前场上角色的<color=#ffcc33>普通攻击与元素战技</color>造成的伤害提升<color=#ffcc33>{1}%</color>，若角色处于<color=#ffcc33>夜魂加持</color>状态，角色的<color=#ffcc33>普通攻击与元素战技</color>造成的伤害将额外提升<color=#ffcc33>{2}%</color>。
- I didn't know you had such a knack for home décor. This bedroom is quite suitable. ｜ 没想到你对家居装潢也有造诣，这间卧室相当得体。
- So, uh... could you tell me a bit about the details behind their development plans? ｜ 所以…所以你能不能透露，透露一下开发计划的细节。
- Cyrus is here, and unless I've misunderstood — you're all quite anxious to see him again. ｜ 居勒什就在这里，你们应该很期待和他见面吧，各位。
- Very well! I am the one whomst hath traveled here from beyond the stars! ｜ 好！我乃跨越星海的唯一之人！

- So you even know how to sew, too? ｜ 诺艾尔连缝纫都会吗？

- "...We should not have let such a young child come with us. The Masters of the Night-Wind are truly inhumane in such matters. She is ten years my sister's junior. - Heated Battle Mode ｜ 热斗模式
- Hehe, much has been happening within the Akademiya, and Gafoor is paving the way for his future. ｜ 呵呵，教令院内部似乎发生了什么不得了的事，我的这位师兄啊，正在为他自己的前程奔走呢。
- Claim Rewards ｜ 领取奖励
- I have my doubts. ｜ 我觉得不太可能。
- For all the wondrous feats that can be accomplished by one who has mastered the mechanical arts, one often uses it for purely recreational purposes. There was one year when it snowed heavily in Liyue, and Mt. Aocang was covered in several feet of snow. Seeing everyone cooped up in their abodes with nothing to do, one created a Snowdrift Mechanism for skiing on the mountains. One was having a tremendous time of it along with Guizhong and Streetward Rambler... until, of course, Moon Carver noticed as much and decided to join in. Moments later, he had managed to send the mechanism flying off the rails and plummeted deep into a snow bank. It took us hours to dig him out... Later, one introduced a great many safety features to the mechanism, to the point where it could be safely piloted by even a three-year-old child. Although this did entail a compromise on the top speed of the vehicle. ｜ 机关术虽有诸多神妙用途，但有时不过是本仙消磨时间的游乐产物。有一年璃月大雪，奥藏山积雪很深，本仙见众人终日待在洞府，无所事事，便造了个「追风滑雪神机」。削月那老家伙见本仙和归终、歌尘等人玩得起劲，也要加入，可他出师不利，第一次试滑便脱了轨道，连人带机关砸进了旁边的积雪里。我们铲了半天才将他挖出来…后来本仙特地给他在防护性上加固了不少，便是三岁稚子也能安稳操控，只是速度慢些罢了。
- Look, I know what I need to know, it's called being a free oni! ｜ 不知道很奇怪吗？我是自由的鬼啊。
- Jamikayomars is located at the entrance of Mawtiyima. Use the elixir to awaken him and open up the closed passageway. ｜ 「阎迦由玛」正位于「无郁夷摩」的入口，使用灵药唤醒他，打开封闭的通道吧。
- Regenerates 15 Energy for Diona after the effects of <color=#FFD780FF>Signature Mix</color> end. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>最烈特调</color>的效果结束时，为迪奥娜恢复15点元素能量。
- Tighnari and Collei never said it to my face, but they found Kaveh's personal anecdotes far more entertaining than the jokes I had prepared... I could see it on their faces. Hmm? What did I think about that? Well, I thought it was funny that they could laugh at such a situation. ｜ 提纳里和柯莱没有亲口说出来，但他们之间的眼神交流已经说明了一切。卡维分享的亲身经历比我准备的笑话有趣多了。我的看法？我觉得他们会为这种事情发笑，反倒是挺好笑的。

- I'm starting to worry that we're being affected by the changes in this space. In order to avoid the sudden accumulation of hunger and fatigue, we should eat and rest regularly from now on. ｜ 我现在担心，我们的状态会不会受到空间变化的影响。为了防止爆发式的饥饿和疲劳，之后我们要按时进食休息。

- Wh—What do you mean? ｜ 什、什么意思？
- Are you on vacation? ｜ 你在休假？
- When I first heard about the legend of the mysterious island, I took note of its description. ｜ 第一次听说神秘岛传说的时候，我就注意到了与神秘岛相关的描述。
- But I don't think they'd be willing to come under the current conditions in Inazuma... ｜ 但是，以稻妻现在这个情况，他们应该不太会愿意来吧…
- See you. May Watatsumi Omikami watch over you. ｜ 再见，「海祇大御神」保佑你。
- Eh, look! The light in the bottle has dimmed... Liloupar! Are you alright? ｜ 欸…你看，瓶子里的光变暗了…利露帕尔，你还好吗？
- I only managed to retrieve one of them... ｜ 只拿到一份…
- I'll be ready to help whenever you need me. ｜ 如果你需要我帮忙的话，就尽管叫我吧。

- Iaune seems to have changed the spot in which he eats... ｜ 艾尤恩似乎换了个地方吃饭…
- Hmm... I don't want to put too much on your plate. It wouldn't be fair to ask you to make so many potions at once. ｜ 嗯…同时做这么多药剂，我担心你们会忙不过来。
- Ah, so that rumor about the Traveler was true! And here I thought that Muning was just boasting... ｜ 啊，原来那个旅行者的传闻是真的，我以为沐宁在和我吹牛呢…
- Hmm, would you look at that... the name of this room is the "Feiyun Study Room." ｜ 你看这书斋的名字…「绯云文斋」。
- When I read about the Knights of Favonius and the Millelith in books, their rules and philosophies seem so different... ｜ 西风骑士和千岩军…看书的时候，总觉得大家的准则和理念区别都很大…
- Please excuse us, Your Grace. It was never our intention to disturb you like this. You see, Avice's mental state has been rather unstable ever since she arrived at the Fortress... ｜ 不好意思，公爵大人，让您见笑了。阿维丝从到梅洛彼得堡开始精神就不太稳定…
- Hahaha, you wish! Benny's Adventure Team has had no vacancies in ages... I mean, you must be spoiled for choice, right? Why'd you wanna join the unluckiest adventurer alive, anyway? ｜ 哈哈，不行的，「班尼冒险团」早就满员了…合适的人选有那么多，没必要找我这个倒霉蛋吧？
- Valley Gate: Bustling Yard ｜ 秀谷院门-「若市门庭」
- I'll head there immediately, get her to come down, and scold her a bit. ｜ 我马上去那边，把她给叫下来好好教训一下。
- Of course. A researcher must always persist in their views. For instance, it doesn't matter how much everyone thinks that Mondstadt only has The Four Winds. Well, I reckon that there are five! ｜ 当然。身为学者，就要有坚持自己观点的精神，哪怕其他人都认为蒙德的四风守护像字面一样只有四个，我也坚持说它们其实有五个！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making The Mellow Pot.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『于醇厚的壶浆中』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Tonina gestures to a staff member in the distance... ｜ 图尼娜向远处的一位工作人员示意…
- Victuals? Oh, it's been too long since I've had any victuals... ｜ 大福？啊，好久没吃过大福了…
- Ah! It seemed someone wanted to speak to me just now, yet was scared off by what I was muttering about... Are organizational questions that scary? ｜ 啊呀，好像有个想搭话的人被我的自言自语吓跑了…组织学的问题有那么吓人吗？
- Phantomeow ｜ 魅影猫
- Are you on patrol? ｜ 你在巡逻？
- Elemental Reaction: Vaporize (I) ｜ 元素反应：蒸发·一
- Diffract. ｜ 分光。
- Consider that intel my gift to you! ｜ 这情报就当是贺礼吧！
- Oh, our village used to be so lively. Merchants looking for dye, adventurers heading to Inazuma from Ritou, outlanders touring the land... This place used be filled with people from everywhere, and I used to show them around and give them directions. ｜ 以前村子里可热闹了。来采购染料作物的商人、从离岛前往稻妻城的冒险家、驻足采风的外国旅客…什么人都来过，我也经常为他们介绍村子，答疑指路。
- We were also planning on having a victory feast once we're all finished filming. You can join us, right? ｜ 我们准备等映影杀青之后，一起开个庆功宴。你们也会来的吧？
- "I've memorized all the effects of the cards... - You can equip a maximum of 3 Stratagems per combat round that will provide buffs in battle.\nWhen each combat round ends, 5 Stratagems will be drawn out at random to be used in the next round.\nYou may consume Stratagem Shards to redraw Stratagems or to select a previously equipped Stratagem for continued use. ｜ 每轮战斗中，至多可以配备3种「战策」，为战斗提供增益。\n每轮战斗结束时，将随机抽取出5种「战策」，可供下一轮战斗使用。\n通过消耗「战策碎珀」，可以重新抽取当前的「战策」，也可以选择上一轮战斗中配备的「战策」继续使用。

- The likeness of Paimon, as drawn by Albedo. Strikingly lifelike and featuring exquisite brushwork, the overall look of this image is brilliant indeed. Albedo sought Paimon's opinion in coming up with the full, proper name for this work: "A Portrait of the Traveler's Dear and Paramount Companion, Top Gourmet, and Teyvat's Number One Guide, Paimon." Unfortunately, Paimon herself cannot remember this name, and so it has been truncated to "A Portrait of Paimon, the Greatest Companion." ｜ 阿贝多为派蒙绘制的画像，形神具备，笔法细腻，整体观感极佳。为这幅画命名时，阿贝多征求了派蒙的意见，采用了相当正式的写法——「旅行者亲爱的挚友兼首席助手兼顶级美食家兼提瓦特第一向导派蒙的肖像」，但这个名字连派蒙自己都记不住，还是简称为「亲爱的挚友派蒙的肖像」好了。
- The <color=#00E1FFFF>elemental traces</color> are very faint, but I can tell that the thief took it beyond the city walls. ｜ 虽然是很微弱的<color=#00E1FFFF>元素力</color>反应，但看得出来偷书人已经把书带往城外了。

- I was a very close friend of your father's. I could have stopped him from performing the summoning ritual — I had plenty of chances, but... I couldn't bring myself to stand up to him. - Well then, how about I appoint you as the head of the Spina in Simulanka? While I'm off fighting the dragon with the other heroes, it'll be your responsibility to work with the guards and take good care of the people in the Metropole. ｜ 那你不如就做希穆兰卡分会的会长吧，在我和勇者去讨伐邪龙的这段时间里，要和卫兵队一起好好帮助王城的居民哦。

- Aaru Village is where I was born and grew up. Even back when I was too young to understand anything else about the world, the one thing I knew for sure was that one day, I would take over from my grandfather as sworn protector of our village... Today, I am grateful to now hold this duty. It is what I was born to do. ｜ 我自小就在阿如村出生长大，在我尚且懵懂之时就知道，将来一定会从祖父手中接过守护阿如村的职责…如今，这已是我欣然接受的天职了。

- Huh... Paimon thinks that the Aranara way of communicating has hit her all of a sudden! ｜ 欸…我好像突然明白兰那罗的交流方式了！
- Champvallon. He's a senior researcher at the Fontaine Research Institute. He's always had a rivalry with Raimondo, but I guess he thinks he might be in with a chance since Bossuet has fallen from power. ｜ 尚帕隆。他是枫丹科学院的高级研究员，原本和雷蒙多一派不睦，博絮埃失势之后他大概是觉得自己有机会了吧。
- The mercenaries of the Corps of Thirty are good people... ｜ 「三十人团」的佣兵都是好人…
- A white disc retrieved from the ruler of Cinder City's corroded ruins within Ochkanatlan. It is one of the essential tokens required to journey to the Great Volcano of Tollan and remove the "Flamelord's Blessing" from the little Tepetlisaur's body, and is said to have been one of the fragments left behind when the Flamelord's eye was split in two. According to legend, it is said that the ancient Dragonlord — who once held dominion over all light and wisdom — transformed one of his eyes into a conduit of supreme authority by which all flames might be governed, and that this became his only exploitable weakness... ｜ 自奥奇卡纳塔受蚀的烬城之主处取得的白盘。为前往图兰大火山，去除小嵴锋龙身上的「焰主之祝」，所必须取得的信物之一，据说是「焰主」之眼被一分为二后留下的一部分。传说古代执掌一切光芒与智慧的龙主用自己的一只眼眸化作了控制一切火焰的无上权柄，而那也成为了其唯一能够被击破的弱点…
- Go ahead, Mika. ｜ 继续吧，米卡。

- That's just what I was thinking. ｜ 我也这么想。
- Because he's so poor. His parents died when he was very young and his alcoholic father still owed a huge amount of debt. No one wanted to have anything to do with him. ｜ 因为他太穷了。父母早亡不说，那个酒鬼老爹死前还欠了一大笔外债，没人愿意跟知易扯上关系。
- Ah, you've come to the right man, friend. We make the best fish and chips in the world here! ｜ 亲爱的，你可问对人了。这世界上最好吃的东西非炸鱼薯条莫属！
- Ayaka's travel outfit. Its design is based on the Fontaine dresses depicted in light novel illustrations and seems to reflect the lifestyle of proper ladies who live in that nation. ｜ 神里绫华的出游装扮。比照轻小说插画中的枫丹女性装束而制作的洋装，似乎能借其一窥枫丹淑女的生活风貌。

- No need, no need, you have my utmost thanks. ｜ 不必了不必了，太谢谢你们了。
- People say that a secret shared is a secret no more, but I like to think that true friends keep each other's secrets. ...What? Veiled threat? No, of course not! Granted, as president of Spina di Rosula, I do have my ways of making people keep their mouths shut, but don't worry — I promise not to use those on you. ｜ 有人说秘密一旦说出口就不是秘密了，但能和朋友分享的秘密不是更加珍贵吗？\n…什么啊，我不是在威胁你啦！虽然身为刺玫会的会长，我当然知道很多让人保守秘密的诀窍，但我是不会用在你身上的，安心啦。
- Hey, just remember that if you ever wanna play another match, you can find me anytime! ｜ 欸，挚友，要是还想打牌的话，随时来找我！
- Ordinary dining chairs made from Karmaphala Wood that can be seen everywhere in Sumeru City. These chairs are so ordinary that few people have given them a special nickname. However, after a well-publicized incident where a drunk student tried to arrest a chair but was ultimately subdued by it, everyone gradually committed to memory the counter-assault properties of the chair and acknowledged its safety. ｜ 以「业果木」制成的普通餐椅，在须弥城内寻常可见。这种椅子没什么特色，自然很少有人给它独特的称呼。不过，在发生了「某位醉酒学生试图擒拿椅子但反被制服」的新闻事件后，大家逐渐记住了它「反擒拿」的特点，高度认可了它的安全性。

- Wait — but if being able to fly makes you a mage, what does that make Kaeya? Since he's here too... ｜ 哦！我知道了，如果能飞的就是「魔女」，那凯亚也在车上，凯亚也在飞，他是什么？

- Increases all party members' ATK by 160 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高160点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- A gamepiece based on Suppression Specialist Meks.\nA specialist clockwork meka adapted from the Cal. Scherbius type. They are primarily designed for offensive purposes. Outside of Fontaine, they can use pre-prepared Energy Blocks to move over short distances for short periods of time.\nAs an autonomous weapon of similar size to ordinary human soldiers, the dimensions and offensive capabilities of this meka have reached a certain balance, making it easier to deploy, move, and conceal. The combination of formidable ranged firepower and robust armor allows it to manifest significant offensive and defensive capabilities at the same time, and it is thus rated as a pillar of the battlefield. ｜ 以「压制特化型机关」为原型的兵棋。\n基于「谢尔比乌斯式」，进行了调整的发条机关。在枫丹以外的区域也能通过预先准备的能量块进行短程短时的行动。\n作为体型接近普通人类士兵的自律兵器，这型机关在进攻性和尺寸控制上达成了一定的平衡，有利于部署、机动和隐蔽。其威力可观的射击类武器与坚固的装甲相结合，表现出攻防一体的特性，堪称战斗中的火力支点。
- To borrow the local Liyue lingo, this would be... uh, um... "destined to meet, though originally separated by more than a thousand miles"? ｜ 用璃月人的话来说，这就是…那个，呃…「有缘千里来相会」？
- Come on, let's go to the café. ｜ 走吧，一起去咖啡馆。
- Is drinking a sin, then? ｜ 喝酒也算「罪孽」吗？

- Huh, okay... That actually kinda makes sense... ｜ 是这样吗，唔…好像也有点道理…

- Really? You are not lying to me? ｜ 真的？你们没有在骗我吗？

- Indeed, there's been a misunderstanding. We're companions, of course. ｜ 总之你们误会了。派蒙和我是伙伴。
- Hmm... I think I can push through, just this once... I'm sure I'll still get taller! ｜ 唔唔…就、就这一次的话，就算拿出干劲…应该也不影响长高！

- Someone's Poetry ｜ 谁人的题诗

- If Fontaine Research Institute rejects you, then there's no one else in Fontaine who can take this commission. ｜ 如果「枫丹科学院」把您都拒之门外，那整个枫丹就没有人能接下这份委托了。
- W—Wait, wait! ｜ 等、等等…！
- But that's impossible... It's not like that kid can just grow some wings and fly away. ｜ 嘶…那小子总不能长了翅膀吧…
- My head... It hurts... Please, I beg of you, fight me once more. Use your blade to help me remember. Help me remember everything! ｜ 头…好痛…我恳求你，与我再战，用你的刀帮助我醒来，让我想起一切吧。

- A traditional dish of Fontaine. The foie gras only needs to be pan-fried before being served. Thanks to the masterful temperature control, the golden-brown foie gras tastes enticingly tender. The process takes focus and concentration, or else the delicious liver might be liquefied into an oily mess. ｜ 枫丹的传统菜肴。将肥肝简单煎熟后，就能摆盘上菜。表面焦黄，里内绵软，此般美味皆来源于对火候的精准把控。因此制作时需全神贯注，否则一不留神肥肝就可能变成一锅油了。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Sneku's Thicket."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『斯内库的灌木丛』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- They've all been working very hard, and have always done all they can to fight back against anyone who tried to stop them! Especially Lyney... ｜ 他们很努力，一直在拼尽全力对抗阻挠他们的人！尤其是林尼…
- Huh, that reminds me, I did hear someone yelling from down below... ｜ 说起来，我好像听到下面有人在喊话…

- Fine, looks like we'll have to ask her about it tomorrow. Today was a total information overload, Paimon's head needs some time to recover... ｜ 那好吧，看来得明天一起问问她了，今天知道的消息有点多，我需要放松一下脑袋…

- ...You want to turn off the Wisdom Orb? ｜ 关闭意智宝珠？

- I've got a few questions. ｜ 有些事想请教。

- It's all the same to me, waiting's all I can do anyway. But if you, too, are looking for someone important to you, it's best not to keep waiting forever. ｜ 不管怎样都好，我是只能等下去了，如果你也有重要的人，最好就不要一直等下去。

- Hmm... ｜ 嗯…

- Although to be honest, I wouldn't be averse to a little more atmosphere here — lightning flashing outside the windows, or a blizzard howling away... We could turn the lights off and tell some ghost stories. ｜ 其实呀，要是场景的氛围感强一点，窗外劈道雷光，下点暴风雪什么的，就很适合关灯讲鬼故事了。
- And as long as we can set it up, we should be able to attract more Kamera enthusiasts and further refine the art of taking pictures! ｜ 只要能组建起来，那我们就可以邀请更多「留影机」爱好者，来一起研究拍画片的艺术。

- Mmm... I can tell from the aroma that this is very fine liquor indeed. I'm impressed. ｜ 嗯…闻味道就知道是好酒，难得你费心了。
- As you know, the Abyss is a tough adversary indeed. I only hope that my weapons were used to deliver a mighty blow against it. ｜ 你也知道，深渊真是个难对付的玩意儿，希望我打的刀剑棍棒能给它迎头狠击。

### Part 187

- It's okay. Seeing you care this much about my feelings is more than enough. ｜ 没事，妮露能这样为我考虑，我就已经很幸福了。
- Ugh! What, are you reading my mind now!? ｜ 你怎么知道我在想什么？！
- Huh? Would someone as ordinary as me really need monitoring? ｜ 欸？我这样平平无奇的人，有必要监视吗？
- Dain moves really fast, doesn't he... ｜ 戴因先生走得真快…
- Calm down, I'm here to help. You're the ones who helped Vichama, right? ｜ 冷静一点，我是来帮你们的。你们就是帮助维查玛的人，对吧？
- That would be a little childish. ｜ 那也太小孩子气了。
- Crystallize ｜ 结晶
- I guess we'll have to do it this way, then. Thank you. ｜ 也只能这样了，那就拜托你了。

- Stop that! ｜ 别打了！
- Vision ｜ 神之眼
- No matter what they may be planning, you must be careful when dealing with the Fatui. Always be on your guard. ｜ 不论「愚人众」在图谋什么，总之，与他们打交道时，凡事都多留个心眼吧。
- Let's put that aside for now, though. It's time to paint! ｜ 不过这个先放一边。我们开始画画吧！
- Such insolence, to take my noble life and use it to nourish these despicable bugs! ｜ 竟敢拿我高贵的生命，去供养这些可憎的虫子！
- I'm fine, it's nothing. I must've caught a cold a couple days ago while I was out at sea. ｜ 没事没事，估计是前两天出海的时候冻着了。
- Each of these clues expounds upon the meaning of one of the Four Commandments. ｜ 不过，这四句话都是关于「归终四诫」中某一条的解释。
- Huh? ｜ 哈？
- Rrrooo... ｜ 唔…
- I see. I understand the situation. ｜ 原来如此，情况我已大致了解了。
- Sage-Lord of Fungi ｜ 「蕈之贤主」
- Aramaha resisted very hard to keep Marana to the side. Without his help, things would have been worse in the nearby forests. ｜ 兰玛哈很努力地抵抗了，把无留陀控制在边上。不然的话，附近的森林情况应该会变得更可怕。
- To be honest, it's not going that well... ｜ 老实说…不太顺利…
- A resplendent yet dignified wine goblet, once filled to the brim in an era long gone. ｜ 华丽而不失庄重的酒樽，千年前曾满盛玉露。
- I've forgotten... ｜ 忘记了…

- Plama Lawa ｜ Plama Lawa

- Ei ｜ 影

- Lynette is cute two times over: human-being-cute, and kitty-cute! After observing her a little bit, I noticed that her ears lean forward when she's having tea and cake. Hee-hee, I just wanna stroke her on the head... You too? Why don't we ask her for permission next time? ｜ 琳妮特小姐兼具了人类和猫猫的双重可爱！我稍微观察了一下，她在喝茶和吃蛋糕时耳朵会微微向前，呵呵，真想摸摸她的头…你也一样？下次我们一起去征求她的同意吧？
- Squee? ｜ 啾？
- Besides, making money is easy. Even with half my talent, you should still be able to make as much as the Homayanis. ｜ 更何况赚钱又不是什么难事。哪怕只有我一半的本事，也至少能赚到呼玛伊家那种程度吧？
- Accumulated 20 or more Adventure Coins ｜ 累计获得20枚及以上的冒险币
- I have never once questioned a single one of the Shogun's decisions. ｜ 对于将军大人的任何决定，我都没有疑问。
- Ah, great! First it was eating sand everywhere, then it was escorting that living nightmare, and now it's you guys!? What other "little surprises" have you got for me!? Ugh, that does it! I've had enough! ｜ 啊！太好了！先是到处吃倒霉沙子，然后是押运那个女瘟神，现在又是你们！！接下来还有什么「小惊喜」？！我受够了！！
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！

- Now, now, we shouldn't rush anything. We need to follow the instructions! ｜ 你们别着急啊，要按照规范操作才行！
- My impression is that each day in this samsara only ends at the sound of that beep from the Akasha. ｜ 印象里，每一个昨天，都是在虚空音效响起后才结束的…
- I never enjoy leftovers that have been left too long. It just feels like sacrilege to neglect the poor food when it's fresh, then eat after it's gone stale... ｜ 我不喜欢存放了很久的剩菜，感觉辜负了新鲜食材的一生…

- I thought you might not be in the mood. ｜ 我以为你没心情呢。
- Aaru's Shut ｜ 阿如的倒影
- I appreciate the concern. I'll take a break once I'm done here... But will there ever come a day when my work is truly done...? ｜ 多谢关心，我干完这点活就暂时消停一下…不过，真的会有彻底干完工作的一天吗…
- We just need to wait until everyone else has fallen asleep... ｜ 至少要坚持到大家都睡了…

- Whew... Third time's a charm. Please let me hook some fish! Even a teeny-tiny one will do. ｜ 呼…这都三次了，哪怕拇指大的鱼也行，至少来条鱼咬一次我的钩吧！
- Stone carvings were one such ancient method. But unchanging stone, immovable earth, even one such as myself... Someday, we may all disappear. ｜ 刻石曾是一种久远的「记录」。但看似不变的磐石、看似不变的世界与我…或许也都会在某一天消失。
- Well, that's my weight under control, but... Hmm? What's up? ｜ 唔，体重倒是控制住了，不过…嗯？怎么了，有什么事吗？

- In that case, Paimon will be the audience. Paimon is the most professional... and freest audience you'll ever find! Hehe. ｜ 那观众的位置就交给我好了，我是最专业…也是最自由的观众！嘿嘿。
- Awesome! You gotta be careful out on the cliffs, though. They're really steep. Even grown-ups have trouble climbing them. ｜ #哇！{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#两位姐姐}要注意安全哦，山崖很陡，族里的大人也没那么容易爬上去。
- You describe Livre's experiences and desire to borrow the form... ｜ 叙述了利弗的经历和想要借表格的请求…
- My family has been farming here for generations. Most of the good wines you've had were probably fermented using the grapes here. ｜ 我们家祖祖辈辈都在耕这块地，如果你在这儿尝到过什么好葡萄酒，我敢说十有八九是这地里的葡萄酿的。

Anyway... that marked the beginning of the end for the old guard... ｜ 可是自从至冬国的那些银行家们仗着愚人众的支持，挤进了璃月的金融市场，我们这些老字号一个个都不好干了…
- A lofty Birch tree. The golden color of the leaves indicates that the wood is currently at its hardest. It can provide excellent-quality timber — if you have the time and energy to put into chopping one down. ｜ 高大的桦木。树叶呈现出金黄的色彩，此时木质最为坚硬，是优秀的木材，不过砍伐它们需要花费不少功夫。

- A set of three phlogiston lamps, each with a stone base and a metal lamp frame, durable and reliable, found within the Masters of the Night-Wind community.\nThe tribe is perched on the cliffs of Tezcatepetonco Range, where the rugged terrain and complex cave structures make the use and maintenance of large street lamps challenging. As a solution, people opted for a combination of smaller lamps grouped together. This not only reduced costs but also created a calm, glowing effect in the caves, akin to the serene light of Glowing Hornshrooms, ideal for meditation and deep contemplation. ｜ 由三台燃素灯具组成的路灯组，三台灯的底座均以石材配合金属灯架制成，颇为可靠且耐用，可在「烟谜主」内见到。\n「烟谜主」部族坐落在镜璧山的悬崖之上，其内部地形崎岖，且拥有复杂的洞穴结构。在这样的场景下，使用或维护大型路灯都极为困难。因此，人们选择了将多台小型路灯组合成一组的照明方案。这不仅节省了成本，而且还能在洞穴环境中营造出一种类似于微光角菌群的平静光照效果，以便人们更好地进行冥想和深思。

- Despite her incredibly weak disposition, she still chose to make a stand. Perhaps she wanted to prove a point, or perhaps she didn't want to leave regrets... ｜ 哪怕无比虚弱，她还是选择了挺身而出。或许是想要证明，或许是不愿后悔…
- If you want ingredients for snacks, I've got them aplenty, but these things are difficult to move, darling, I haven't got many in stock. ｜ 你要买点心调料我有的是，需要这种东西我可难办了，货不多。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Well, you are quite bright, aren't you? As I would expect of someone I have my eye on. ｜ 很上道嘛，不愧是我看中的人类。
- After arriving in Fontaine, Yelena continued using the Delusion to cultivate the "Auguste" flower, weakening her body even further. There were times when she couldn't even walk. ｜ 来到枫丹之后，继续用邪眼培育「奥古斯都」…让她的身体更加脆弱，最严重的情况下，连行动都不方便。

- A soldier encased within a Fatui war machine.\nThese skirmishers do not question if they shall live or die as they advance into nations far from home to complete reconnaissance missions and lay the groundwork for operations to come.\nUnlike the elite Mages and Agents, Fatui Skirmishers are soldiers of lesser individual might.\nTo complete their tasks and reduce losses in men and material, their tactics are thus more reliant on teamwork. ｜ 愚人众战争机器中的士兵。\n「先遣队」之名意味着生死不问，深入祖国以外的土地完成前期任务，为未来的某些行动夯实基础。\n不同于少数精锐的债务处理人与萤术士，先遣队的单兵实力与装备较为薄弱。\n为了完成任务，为了减少人员与物资的损耗，先遣队的战术更讲究团队协作。

- Here's the thing. To make the novel more appealing, I went out of my way and asked Asagiri to draw illustrations for it. ｜ 是这样，为了让《召唤王》这本小说更有吸引力，我特意去拜托朝雾小姐来绘制插画。

- An agile and wise soul, endowed since birth with a well-maintained elegance and pride.\n"Mommy, look, that kitty looks like a dirty wee ball of snow!" This mischievous cat's name did indeed originate from a young child's faux-pas. Gray Snow Cats are very playful creatures, and any time or place can become a war-zone for their frolicking — much to the chagrin of their owners, who must always then give them baths. ｜ 灵巧而富有智慧的生灵，抱持着与生俱来的优雅与骄傲。\n「妈妈快看，那个咪咪好像一坨脏脏雪！」这种调皮猫咪的名字正是来自一个顽童的言语冒犯。灰雪猫是一种非常活泼的猫咪，各种场地都能成为它们嬉戏打闹的战场，倒是苦了那些总要给它们洗澡的主人。

- The challenge contains both <color=#ffcc33>Collection</color> and <color=#ffcc33>Evasion</color> phases, and you will have to evade periodic incoming barrages from the mechanisms while collecting Labyrinth Coins during the allotted time. Collect Labyrinth Coins to gain points, Adventure Risk, and Risk Level. <color=#ffcc33>The higher the Risk Level, the greater the volume of incoming fire, and the more Labyrinth Coins that will appear</color>. If no Labyrinth Coins are collected for some time, Risk Energy will rapidly decrease. ｜ 挑战分为<color=#ffcc33>收集阶段</color>和<color=#ffcc33>躲避阶段</color>，二者交替进行，需要在限定时间内躲避机关弹幕，收集迷宫币。收集迷宫币可以获取得分、冒险锐势与锐势等级，<color=#ffcc33>锐势等级越高，弹幕难度越高，迷宫币的出现数量也越多</color>。若一段时间未收集到迷宫币，锐势能量将快速下降。

- Veteran miners can tell how deep beneath the surface they are based on the color of the rock beneath their feet. Once this kind of rock starts to appear, it means The Chasm is right up ahead. Because of this, it has been named the "Chasm's Doorstep."\nHowever, due to recent Ley Line disturbances, this stone has started appearing all over the place, rendering the miners' experience useless. ｜ 老道的矿工能根据脚下石块的色彩，判断自己在地下所处的深度。一旦出现这种石块，就说明层岩巨渊近在眼前，因此它有了「临渊石」的称号。\n但据说最近地脉的状况不稳，因此临渊石开始在大陆各地出现，矿工们的经验也没法派上用场了。

- A dish with strong and distinctive flavors. Chop up the sheep offal, mix it with oatmeal, and stuff the mixture into a sheep stomach along with various seasonings and spices to form a bag. This is a local specialty that Fontainians often cook as a treat for important guests. ｜ 风味浓郁的料理。将羊的内脏剁碎与燕麦一同塞入羊胃中，再加上各种调味香料，制成袋状，装盘时往往会去掉胃袋，仅取内容物和萝卜泥、土豆泥一并食用。是一道极具地方特色的佳肴，枫丹人常将其作为招待贵客的菜品。

- Ningguang's Normal Attack, Sparkling Scatter, fires gems which grant Star Jades upon hitting the enemy. Accumulated Star Jades are fired all at once during her Charged Attack, dealing bonus DMG.\nNingguang's Elemental Skill creates a Jade Screen that deals Geo DMG and blocks enemy projectiles. Her Elemental Burst releases a great number of gems all at once to obliterate the enemy.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 凝光千金一掷的普通攻击所发射的宝石如果命中敌人，则可获得一枚星璇。在释放重击时星璇会一同射出，对命中的敌人造成额外的伤害。\n她元素战技展开的璇玑屏可以造成岩元素伤害并阻挡敌人的投射物，而元素爆发则可以在瞬间发射众多宝石一同攻击敌人。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

Accepting her request, you go off to find Albedo and strike up a conversation with him. Discovering his secret proves an effortless task — it is an unusual sword. To unlock its secrets, Albedo asks you to use it in battle on the Snowy Mountain. ｜ 你在山脚下的冒险家营地遇到砂糖，她想请你帮忙调查阿贝多的「秘密」。受她委托前往调查阿贝多秘密的你，没费什么力气就得知了他所隐藏的事——一把不同寻常的单手剑。为了探知剑的奥秘，阿贝多委托你使用这把剑在雪山战斗。

- A fruit with gorgeous skin. - A simple fence made from Brightwood and vines that has an upside-down triangular pattern. It is said that Forest Watchers used to set these fences up around no-fishing zones to maintain ecological balance and only opened such areas to fisher-people during specific periods. However, with fishing activity declining, such fences have seen far less use. Most people only use these fences around the vicinity of their villages. ｜ 结构简单的围栏，以辉木和藤条搭建而成，编有倒三角形的花纹。传说中，出于维持区域生态平衡的考量，曾有巡林官用这种围墙划分限制狩猎的区域，这种区域只在特定时期对猎人们开放。不过随着狩猎规模的缩减，这种应用场景并不常见，普通居民只会将其当做村落边界的围墙。

- No matter how pressing the situation may become, I must remain composed. If I let the stress get to me, then what can I expect from others around me? ｜ 越是情况紧迫，越要稳住心态。如果连我也陷入不安的话，其他人要怎么办呢？

- I would say that Mondstadt's poetry is a little run-of-the-mill sometimes. ｜ 其实蒙德诗歌整体也就那样啦，创作水平有限。
- If you take the Vision Hunt Decree into account... there's just far too many people whose actions might be interpreted as "suspicious." ｜ 毕竟，在「眼狩令」这种法令下…从行为上能够称得上「可疑」的人实在是太多了。

- The Yashiro Commission is in charge of ritual matters on Narukami Island, and must also attend to matters of cultural leisure in such a manner that deities and the people alike are pleased — and they do, honoring their commission.\nBut with greater responsibilities come greater amounts of work.\nFortunately, his sister Ayaka shares much of the clan's responsibilities, with most of the interactions between the Commission and the people falling to her, allowing Ayato to spend most of his time on matters of governance.\nDealing with Shogunate officials is no easy matter. People come from different Commissions and clans, and their perspectives are very different. Any single task grows harder as the number of people involved grows.\nAyato's great strength lies in his ability to handle such matters. The way he sees it, people are driven by interest. Find leverage, and the other side will cooperate.\nFind some goal that will bring the other party around to your logic, then pacify them with a few choice platitudes for the occasion, and most problems can be resolved.\nAnd when dealing with the stubborn, one merely needs to appeal to a higher power to bear — after all, what mortal could gainsay the light of heaven itself, no matter how high their status or arrogant their attitude?\nOver time, the knowledgeable and decorous Kamisato clan head gained quite the name for himself in the Shogunate.\n"Hmm... this matter seems quite hard to handle. Should we ask the Yashiro Commissioner?"\nSo people would often say.\nHowever, while Ayato is indeed full of ways and means, he will not simply help at any given moment.\nFirstly, not every task is related to the Yashiro Commission. Secondly, it is simply not worth it for the Kamisato Clan to get itself involved for the sake of others' petty profit.\nMostly, Ayato will simply tag along as a junior figure, teacup in hand, doing little more than smiling.\n"Ah, come now, Sir Nagaoka. We are all loyal servants of the Almighty Shogun. Nothing more to it. We just need to be open with each other, and I'm sure we can resolve this issue together." ｜ 社奉行司掌鸣神祭礼事宜，又要管理文化娱乐活动，可谓上达神明，下通民众，无愧笔头之格。\n但相对的，涉足的领域越多，工作也就越繁重。\n幸好妹妹绫华为兄长分担了不少家族事务，社奉行与民间的大部分交流也都交由她，神里绫人因而能将精力更多地放在政务上。\n与幕府官员交涉并不容易。大家分属于不同的奉行、家族，立场各有不同。一件事务，牵扯的人员越多，就越难办成。\n绫人的优势正在于，他很擅长处理这类事情。在他看来，人的行为都受利益驱使，只要抓住痛点，就能令对方妥协。\n狙准一个目标，将对方带进自己的逻辑，再说几句场面话，卖些小小人情给对方，问题多半就能迎刃而解。\n万一遇上顽固不化的人，也只需搬出更高层面的势力来压制即可——毕竟，无论地位如何之高、态度如何狂妄，也没有人能撼动天光的威严，不是吗？\n久而久之，知书达理的神里家主在幕府中混出了相当不错的名声。\n「此事…此事颇为难办，要不要问问社奉行大人怎么看？」\n人们常这么说。\n不过，绫人虽然有许多办法，却也不是随时都愿意出手的。\n一来，并非所有事务都与社奉行有关；二来，只为其他势力的蝇头小利就令神里家卷入其中，实在不值得。\n大多数时间，绫人只是捧一盏热茶，把自己当作一名小辈，微笑敬陪罢了。\n「哎呀，长冈大人，先不必动气。大家都是为将军大人办事，别无二心。只需把话说开，肯定能协力解决。」
- An Akitsu Yuugei challenge that instills a great many Elemental effects into the bricks, making the environment of the board look akin to a yet-skewered tricolor dango mixed in with a few pieces of candy. The experience is guaranteed to be as sweet as it looks! ｜ 结合了多种元素方块的「秋津游艺」挑战，缤纷的颜色如同还未串好的三彩团子，再加几块方形的糖，口味和游玩的体验想必同等甜美！

- Before joining the Knights, I had to take a number of exams. Captain Kaeya was the main person in charge of all the testing. He was really supportive, and gave me all kinds of tips, but sometimes, I would struggle to understand what he was saying... I would get worried that I was not keeping up with his pace, and that I was letting him down... ｜ 入团之前，我接受了许多测试，主考官就是凯亚队长。凯亚队长一直支持着我，给我各种建议…不过，有时我不太理解他的话，担心自己跟不上他的节奏，让他扫兴。

- Well, Venti brought up the time, but Paimon... knows nothing about where it is... Ehe. ｜ 既然时间都是温迪提醒的，我当然也…不知道地点啦。

- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Lately, some Guhua Clan disciples have been retelling an ancient story.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The Guhua Clan, huh? Paimon bets it's a heroic story!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Several male disciples decided to partake of a contest of arms to see who would marry their female junior, and she approved.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Ooh, Paimon's heard this one. In Liyue, they call this "a joust for a spouse"!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> But the night before the contest, she stole the eldest disciple's favorite sword.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Ah, so she wanted him to lose... Poor guy...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I know, right? Forced to use a sword he wasn't used to, the eldest disciple suffered a crushing defeat.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Unable to accept this result, he fell to his knees and wept.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh no... He must have really loved her, right?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> In the end, he was forced to... marry her in front of everyone.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Wait... so the loser had to marry her!? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>最近，听古华派的弟子讲了这样一个故事。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>古华派吗，应该是很侠义的故事吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>几位师兄弟想要通过比武，定下师妹的亲事，师妹也很赞成这么做。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在璃月叫「比武招亲」吧？我听说过！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>可比武前一晚，师妹将大师兄最顺手的那柄剑偷走了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那师兄可真惨…是师妹有意想要他输的呀…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>是啊，后来大师兄用了十分不顺手的剑，惨遭落败。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>他难以接受这样的结局，跪在地上痛哭流涕。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可怜的人…他一定很喜欢那个师妹吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>最终，他不得不在众人的见证下…迎娶了师妹。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>原来是输的人娶吗？！

- When your active character's attack hits an opponent, a Vacuum Field will be created at the enemy's position after configuration, pulling in nearby opponents and dealing True DMG to opponents in it. A Vacuum Field can be triggered in this way once every {0}s. ｜ 配置后，队伍中当前场上自己的角色攻击命中敌人时，会在敌人的位置产生真空吸引场，牵引周围小范围内的其他敌人，并对真空场内的敌人造成真实伤害。每{0}秒至多通过这种方式，产生一次真空吸引场。
- A candy box that is often used in various celebrations in Sumeru. When the girl who would become a researcher was still young, she used to take one candy a day from the box. Back in those days, her biggest worry was that the candy would run out. After becoming a researcher, this empty candy box has become a nostalgic reminder of other possibilities in life. This candy box was left here as a gift. To the researcher, this is also a symbol of freedom from misery. ｜ 经常会用在须弥的各种庆典中的糖果盒。小的时候，尚未成为学者的女孩曾每日从中取出一粒糖果来吃，那时最大的担忧仅是害怕糖果有吃完的一日。成为学者之后，这个已经空了的糖果盒成为了人生另一种可能的念想。这个糖果盒最后被当作礼物留在了此地。这对于学者来说，也是她从一种苦恼中解脱的象征。
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- Perhaps you really do have some academic talent. Would you like me to recommend you to study in the Akademiya once our project comes to a close? ｜ 说不定你真的很有搞学术的天赋欸。等这个项目告一段落，要不要我帮忙推荐你去教令院学习呢？
- "There's an old saying in Liyue Harbor: 'The cooking mirrors the cook.' Smiley Yanxiao, however, doesn't fit this adage. The man's boorish appearance doesn't match the exquisite flavor of the dishes he creates. Who knows what kind of stories he may have?" ｜ 「璃月港有句老话，『菜如其人』。可是言笑师傅却不然，虽然相貌粗莽，做出的菜却有着清亮细腻的品味，不知此人有怎样的故事呢…」

- Never mind... As mysterious as a moving painting is, we're not gonna find the answer by just waiting around. Why don't we go search for clues someplace else? ｜ 唉，算了，虽然还是不知道为什么画会动，但等下去也找不到答案，我们还是先去其他地方看看吧？

- Siltwater lakes usually appear farther inside the desert. According to some very tall tales, they're believed to be Al-Ahmar's blessings. ｜ 这种「淤湖」一般出现在沙漠的深处，在一些神神叨叨的传说里，这种「淤湖」是阿赫玛尔的恩赐。

- But life here doesn't seem all that bad, other than the foreman being kinda mean and the work being pretty tiring... ｜ 不过目前看来，除了监工有点凶，工作有点辛苦以外，这里的生活也不算很糟糕嘛…

- It's already scary when you guys didn't do anything. If you had really done something, it would scare me to death! ｜ 什么都没做，都已经那么可怕了，你们要是真做点什么，那岂不是要吓死我！

- If you think you're up to snuff, why don't you have a crack at it on our behalf? 'Course, that means that once you've got it, it's ours. Don't you try to sneak off with the prize, now... ｜ 你要有本事，就当着我们的面把宝贝拿了。当然，拿到的话，宝贝要归我们，你可别想着要跑…

- As a general rule, the less a person sees of me, the happier their life is. ｜ 理论上来讲，完全不认识我的人会比较幸福。

- Thank goodness you wrapped them in paper... Paimon wouldn't be able to sleep at night knowing something so tasty had been wasted. ｜ 幸好你之前把每块饼都仔细包了起来，要不然我肯定会心疼得晚上连觉都睡不着了。
- Follow Gaming and try to avoid his relatives's notice as much as possible ｜ 跟随嘉明，尽可能避开亲戚注意
- Pure elemental life-forms composed of drifting Anemo particles, as free and unbound as the butterflies they resemble.\nA glittering Anemo creature that is the product of rising and condensing elements, and which feeds off the ubiquitous power of Anemo.\nThey say that the flapping of a butterfly's wings has the power to whip up a storm. ｜ 空气中飘荡不定的风元素微粒聚合而成的纯粹元素生命，同蛱蝶一般悠游。\n闪光的风元素生物，是元素上升凝合而成的产物，以无处不在的风元素维生。\n传说蝴蝶的振翅有着掀起风暴的力量。

- Hahaha, alright, well said. Okay — this time I really am leaving. Bye, everyone. ｜ 哈哈哈哈，真有你的啊，白术。好啦，真得走了，回见啦各位。
- An artificed object designed to produce strange bubbles. These bubbles will move back and forth quickly within a fixed area.\nCharacters hit by these bubbles will be imprisoned within them for a time.\nCharacters who come into contact with a bubble will lose a fixed amount of Life Points. ｜ 被拟想而出的奇异水泡。这个水泡会在一定范围内高速来回移动。\n被水泡攻击的角色被水泡禁锢一段时间。\n被水泡触碰到的角色会被削减一定数量的生命点。
- Um... To be honest, I don't really know how to handle people like Madam Faruzan... She's always saying that I'm a hardworking student and eager to learn, but that's because I have to be! I'm a slow learner, so I have to put in the extra effort. Oh, there was a time when I accidentally saw her research journal — only for a second, though. It was all written in old script, and I couldn't even make out half of it... Definitely the scariest book in Teyvat! ｜ 呃…老实说，我不太擅长应付这位前辈…虽然她经常夸我勤奋好学，但我真的是因为学得太慢，没办法了，才总是在补习啊！还有一回，我不小心看到了她的研究笔记，虽然只瞟了一眼，但那绝对是全须弥最可怕的书！——上面全是古文，我连半个字都看不懂。
- ...None! How shocking! ｜ …竟然是一个都没有欸！
- It's the last form we take when we are at the end of our life. ｜ 它是我们这种生命的末路，也是最后展现出的形态。

- What!? ｜ 咿？！
- I haven't realized it's been so long. I was in such a rush when I left that I didn't even get to say goodbye. ｜ 我也想不到过了这么长时间。当时走得急，都没和你们道别。

- Hmm, you aren't trying to scam us with some strange and useless designs, are you? What if the next time we're back, we'll just find an empty shop, with no sign of you, the Auto-Smith, or the materials we handed over to you... ｜ 唔，你不会拿奇怪的设计图搪塞我们，在我们找你的时候，就发现这家店空空如也，连人带锤锻机一起不见了…
- Huh? What do you mean by probably? ｜ 唉…什么叫大概是啊…
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- Monsieur Os ｜ 呜斯先生
- Though it is a device created using ancient onmyoudou as its base, it can be used by ordinary people. Just aim it at a small animal you'd like to "capture," and toss it right out there! ｜ 虽然是基于古代的阴阳术制造的器物，但一般人也可以方便地使用。只需要瞄准想要「捕获」的小动物，然后稳稳地投出就行了。
- There was a Pari who once sang thus— ｜ 曾有一位花灵如此诵唱——
- You have the ability to move over the lava. If you try, maybe you can reach the island, and earn the highest honor for a guide! ｜ 你拥有在岩浆上行动的能力，你拼一把，或许就能到达那里，获得作为一名向导的至高荣誉！
- Anyway, we should make our way to the next area now. ｜ 总之我们赶紧去下一处地方吧。
- Would it even be usable after getting soaked like that... ｜ 都泡水了这行李还能要吗…
- Perhaps somewhere in this world there exists a cat familiar that can... dive deep into the depths, endure in an inferno, and ride upon the wind! Such a special entity would surely have no fear of thunder or lightning. ｜ 此世的某地或许存在…能潜入水下，耐受烈火，能乘风而行的猫之眷属，必然也有无惧轰雷的特殊个体。
- Hmph, those words almost make you sound like a friend who actually cares. ｜ 哼，光听这些话，你就像个朋友一样关心我。
- Only you could be so toweringly selfish, yet so utterly selfless! ｜ 何等自私又何等无私的计划，也只有你才能想出这样的主意！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 神里绫华
- (It's not too far from Liyue Harbor...) ｜ （听着离璃月港也不远…）
- What's impossible for some... might be just within my reach. ｜ 或许别人做不到，但我可以。
- The courage we have to stand before you and not back down... It comes from our friendship. ｜ 正因为友情，才会让我们充满勇气，无人退缩。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 5 ｜ 好感等级达到5后开启
- Protecting family is an admirable motivation. ｜ 保护家人是很棒的理由。
- Shame... I heard they're doing a buy one get one free promotion for their Padisarah Pudding! ｜ 是吗？真可惜…听说那边的帕蒂沙兰布丁最近买一送一呢。
- Ah, "dear Lesser Lord Kusanali"! You mean how I tend to say things like that? Well, you see, I have a friend from Fontaine who enjoys talking like that. ｜ 噢，我的小吉祥草王啊。您是说这样吗？我有个枫丹朋友，他非常喜欢这么说话。
- There's no point in worrying too much. ｜ 光提心吊胆也不是办法。
- Defeat a Pyro Regisvine in Co-Op Mode. ｜ 与其他玩家一同战胜爆炎树。
- So, the mage who received the prophecy letter from all of you was J? She left the Hexenzirkel after getting married? ｜ 所以说，那个被同伴们寄了预言信的魔女就是J？她结婚以后离开了魔女会？
- ...Here. Take this. ｜ …来，给你这个。
- (If only I could work on a big project with unlimited funding...) ｜ （好想做不用为经费发愁的大项目啊…）
- Yikes! Where did they all come from!? This just makes no sense... ｜ 呜哇！这群家伙是什么时候来的，完全没有道理呀！
- Pine Wood ｜ 松木
- Getting the Marechaussee Phantom to notice Pierre was only the first part of your plan. Had they failed to take notice of the Humane Society, they could have cast a wider net... ｜ 让逐影庭盯上皮埃尔只是第一步。但如果他们没有如你所愿，立刻去怀疑「爱心社」的话…
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Teahouse Stove: Slow Steaming.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「茶坊炉灶-『细蒸缓焙』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- That should do it. Let's go back and look for Linorea! ｜ 这样应该就可以了…我们回去找莉诺蕾娅小姐吧。
- (I guess it all comes down to this. Ah, my son...) ｜ （算是，结束了吧…我的儿子。）
- Viktor's going to leave Mondstadt soon. ｜ 维克多马上就要离开蒙德城了。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Exactly! I was also really surprised at how quickly you picked it up. I thought it would have taken way more time... ｜ 是呀，我也很惊讶，原本以为需要花更长的时间呢…
- Restores 40% of Max HP and an additional 2,350 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的40%，并额外恢复2350点生命值。
- Last warning, get out before I kick you out! You hear!? ｜ 再不离开的话，我就要动手了！
- Go to the lower levels of the Flamegranate's roots ｜ 前往火榴树根系下层
- Like what? Like... "These are good photos, aren't they"...? ｜ 说什么啊，说画片拍得好？
- Meow! Yes, this work was given specifically to me by Hibiki. A vital task to be completed by no other. ｜ 喵喵，这项工作可是阿响专门交付给奴家，只有奴家才能完成的重要工作呢。
- I trust that shouldn't be a problem for you! ｜ 我想这应该难不倒你！
- Huh? Where's the last person? The prince looked frantically around, but could not find the person he wanted to see most. At that moment, the person suddenly appeared on the other side of the bridge. She walked towards him with a smile and slowly lifted her veil. ｜ 咦？还有一个人呢？王子四处张望，却没有找到她。这时，那个人突然出现在了桥的另一头，她微笑着走过来，揭开了面罩。
- So do you need us to teach you to cook? ｜ 你们需要我们教你们做菜吗？
- When the flame-lord of the many dragons feigned death on account of the pitch-black shadow that plagued him, when the human populace outside the volcano raised their banners of resistance...\nPerhaps only violence could have suppressed the unease that people felt in their hearts. ｜ 在诸多龙众的焰主因漆黑阴影的纠缠而陷入假死，火山之外人类掀起反抗的旌旗之时。\n或许唯有暴力，才足以压倒心中隐约的不安吧。
- That might be a bit of an overstatement. I'm just considering what to do on an off day. ｜ 说是假期有点夸张了，只是在想平常休息日要做些什么。
- Arcantel ｜ 阿坎蒂
- Why am I having more and more patients lately... ｜ 最近的病人怎么越来越多了…
- Let's go back to Smiley Yanxiao and get a new one. ｜ 我们回去找言笑重新拿一份吧。
- You beat me fair and square, Kinich... People always talk about how tough you are, and now I can say for sure: they're not exaggerating. ｜ 不愧是大名鼎鼎的基尼奇，你真是太厉害了。我心服口服。
- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- Hu Tao's a step ahead. She's already talking about printing a poetry anthology. ｜ 胡堂主快人一步，这会儿已经在谈出诗集的事了。
- I need a while more to prepare. ｜ 不，还需要准备一下。
- Who knows, maybe Mr. Hirayama's over there too. We'll take you over there to see if we can find him, Albedo! ｜ 阿贝多，编辑长说不定也在那边，我们这就带你过去找他！
- Whatever... You think you're the boss? Paimon'll show you how wrong you are. It's show time! ｜ 算了…这种时候就要表现得比对方更凶狠才行，看我的。
- I dare say that I earned the title of a scholar. Yet I cannot call myself a good daughter, student, or friend. ｜ 我敢说自己无愧于学者这个头衔…可我并不是一个合格的女儿、学生、朋友…
- Go to the camp by the water ｜ 前往水边营地
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Click}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} Ready and wait for other players. Co-Op challenge will be automatically abandoned if not confirmed in {0} second(s). ｜ 点击准备等待其他玩家，{0}秒内不确认将自动解散挑战
- You and Sayu are discovered. The infiltration falls through. ｜ 你和早柚被人发现，潜入计划失败了。
- A large device designed by the late Edwin Eastinghouse. It has the ability to "counteract" the effects of gravity. According to the original design intentions, this was the first step in a plan to turn Fontaine into a city in the sky, so never again would the people have to worry about the waves that once swept over the land. Even if all seven nations were to be swallowed by the deeps, the elegant Court of Fontaine would float above it all, just like Celestia. Even the secrets of the universe would no longer seem so distant.\nThe Arkhium in the device's core has the characteristics of "splitting" or "precipitation," and can take matter, or certain things outside of matter, and separate them. It is said that this process can be reversed, but the Fontaine Research Institute is infatuated only with the physical effects it can produce. ｜ 艾德温·伊斯丁豪斯生前设计的大型装置。依照原本的设计意图，拥有「抵消」重力的效果；依照原本的设计意图，这将是将枫丹建设成天空之都的第一步，从此以后再也没有人需要为曾经荡涤大地的浪潮而忧心，即使七国尽没深海，瑰丽的枫丹廷也将如天空岛那样在空中漂游。就连宇宙的秘密也将变得不那么遥不可及。\n装置核心的始基矿拥有「分离」或是「沉淀」的特性，能够将物质，或是某些物质以外的事物分离；传说这样的性质也能被反转，但枫丹科学院只醉心于它所能产生的物理效用。

- Oh really? I thought I was persona non grata at Bubu Pharmacy? You're being unusually generous today. ｜ 哦？你不是向来防着我吗？这次倒挺大方。

- No doubt about that! ｜ 是啊，是啊！
- ...On the day of the real exam, if — and I mean only if... ｜ …等到正式考试开始的那天，如果，我是说如果…
- Grant it to me, oh being of eternity. ｜ 赐给我吧，永恒之物。
- Umm... maybe it's a bit late for the disclaimer? Anyway, I'm happy you've had an incident-free journey today, and it was my pleasure to serve as your tour guide for this trip. Thank you! ｜ 嗯…说得可能有点晚了？不管怎么说，很高兴您没有在航行途中遇到意外事故，我也很荣幸能担任本次航行的讲解，谢谢！
- Before I retrieve your products, I need to confirm a few things. ｜ 二位，在拿货之前还有几件事要确认一下。
- Eh? Enemies? Where? ｜ 欸？敌人？！在哪里呀！
- (Let's head back to the Children of Echoes and ask Naiyan for more details.) ｜ （先回一趟回声之子，找尼娅了解一下吧。）

- Is that all, Broglie? ｜ 怎么样，布罗意，这些就是全部了吗？
- I seldom participate in such lively gatherings, but the atmosphere here is quite good. ｜ 很少参加这么热闹的聚会，氛围还是很不错的。
- I'm sorry that we weren't much help. ｜ 对不起啊，没能帮上你们的忙。

- Am I really that awesome? I had no idea. ｜ 我有这么厉害？我自己怎么不知道。

- I've got no clue. Maybe they were all made up — that would certainly explain why no one's found the legendary treasure this whole time! ｜ 谁知道呢，说不定传说都是编的，所以这么多年了才没有人真的找到过传说中的宝物。
- Looking at the sea brings a lot of things to my heart, and my mind moves slower, too. ｜ 一看海，心中就会想到很多事，脑子也运转得慢了许多。
- Oh, the pain! The pain of it all! ｜ ——「悲伤」起来了！
- I can get the coffee! It's the perfect job for an assistant! ｜ 我去我去！这是助理该干的活嘛！
- Do you still have any lingering concerns? ｜ 你还有什么担心的问题吗？
- After that, I looked toward the paper's office and saw that Sir Arthur was missing. I was afraid of becoming a suspect, so I hurried back to my usual haunt at the docks. ｜ 我往报社那边一看，这才发现亚瑟先生不见了，我担心被人怀疑，就赶紧跑回了码头的小窝。

- Is everything okay? Give me a second, let me get Collei. ｜ 出事了吗？我去叫一下柯莱，稍等。
- Hey, you guys, there's a slip of paper over here! ｜ 喂！你们看，这里有张纸条！

- Strange Sound ｜ 奇怪的叫声

- Hehe, you're too kind! As long as there's plenty of tea and snacks waiting for us the next time we come! ｜ 嘿嘿，大恩不言谢嘛！只要我们下次来的时候，茶饮点心管够就行！

She picks them all up — they are as valuable as Mora in this place, after all. ｜ 做完这一切，她又从口袋里摸索着掏出了另一个造型奇特的机械元件——看上去像是一块包装精致的糖果，上面刻着几个难以辨识的符号。她将元件嵌在了位于机器狗头部的齿轮中央，然后咔嚓一声将它合了起来…\n\n地上还散落着一些不知道是做什么用的零件。姑且帮玛梅赫收起来了，毕竟在这里是像摩拉一样的东西。

- A gamepiece based on Floating Hydro Fungi.\nA spore organism of some intelligence. It possesses extreme adaptability. It appears quite fragile, and most individuals found out in the wild are generally harmless, yet some Floating Hydro Fungi have significant capabilities of understanding, and have great potential to assist warriors in battle. For this reason, studying their battle patterns could improve your martial capabilities. ｜ 以「浮游水蕈兽」为原型的兵棋。\n拥有一定智能的孢子生物，具有强大的环境适应能力。虽说外表看上去弱不禁风，大部分野外的个体也采取着近乎无害的行为模式，但部分浮游水蕈兽的个体似乎有着可观的理解能力，有潜力成为与将士们并肩作战的助手。因此，研究其战斗模式，也可能在将来增强己方的力量。

- A Genius Invokation TCG card back that can be obtained and switched around. They say that card backs with different designs also come with minute differences in make and texture. Some players also make collecting card backs of different styles their pursuit and hobby. ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得并替换的牌背。据说看上去造型各不相同的牌背，其材质与手感也有微妙的差别，也有牌手将搜集不同的牌背作为追求与爱好。
- Character Ascension Material ｜ 角色突破素材
- A gift given to a very special someone on a very special day.\n\nHere's to you, the symphony and echoes amidst verdant trees.\nWishing you happiness and peace in your sweet dreams. ｜ 在某个意义重大的日子获得的礼品。\n\n献给于林中奏曲并探听婆娑回音的你。\n祈愿你在甜美的梦境中得享幸福与安宁。

- For every character in the party who hails from Liyue, the character who equips this weapon gains a <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> ATK increase and a <color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color> CRIT Rate increase. This effect stacks up to 4 times. ｜ 队伍中每有一位璃月角色，装备该武器的角色便获得<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>攻击力提升与<color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color>暴击率提升。至多获得4层提升效果。
- Freaked out by a young lady... ｜ 你们还能被她给吓住…
- We'll show you how. ｜ 我们会向你展示原因。
- Time to head home... ｜ 该回家了…

- You want to know of my legendary tales? Hahaha, that's just my men exaggerating, adding in their own little details. Although, if you were to ask me if I'm afraid of what monsters lurk in the deep, I'd tell you I have no fear of them. ｜ 那些关于我的传奇故事？哈哈哈，那是兄弟们看重，才在夸我的时候添油加醋。不过，你要问我怕不怕在出海的时候遇到什么魔物，那自然是不怕的。
- Destroy the hilichurl towers ｜ 摧毁丘丘人哨塔
- "I sometimes catch a glimpse of a youth standing on top floor, but I've never seen this person before around the inn. Could it be my imagination?" ｜ 「我有时会瞥见顶楼伫立着一位少年，但从未在客栈周围见过此人。难道是我的幻觉吗？」
- The automated defense mechanisms of the ancient ruins have been activated by the power of some crystals. If you can destroy these automated mechanisms in a short time, you may gain the Crimson Agate that the Frostbearing Tree longs for. ｜ 远古遗迹中的自律守护机关因为某些结晶的力量发生异动。能够在短时间内破坏这些守护机关的话，或许就能取得忍冬之树渴求的绯红玉髓了吧。
- Can you hear me? ｜ 听得到我说话吗？
- Get rid of these enemies as soon as possible to ensure the safety of the Lantern Rite. ｜ 为了保障海灯节安全举行，必须尽快打倒这些敌人。
- They left something behind... Yes, it's an elegy written in an ancient script. ｜ 有遗物。…嗯，是用古代文字写的悼念书。
- "...Basic biological tests were conducted... Turned out it is much weaker than regular Blubberbeasts. If it is returned to its original habitat, the estimated chance of survival would be no more than 20%..." ｜ 「…执行了基础的生理检测…比普通的膨膨兽要羸弱，直接放归原本生态环境的话，推定生存概率不超过百分之二十…」
- Mountain, there! ｜ 山就在那里！
- ...Not that I'm saying that knowledge is that good, but you should understand what I mean, right? ｜ …倒不是说知识是什么好东西啦，但你大概能明白我的意思吧。
- No. It seems that people specifically come here to feed the gulls, so they've no interest in my fries. ｜ 没有。这里经常有人专门过来喂食，这群紫金渔鸥对我的薯条没有兴趣。
